name: A Bar Above Bar Spoon (Gold)
description:
They're heavy. They're balanced. They think you look great today, by the way. These bar spoons are calibrated for balance: With a heavy, weighted bolt on the end, they definitely know how to stir up a great drink!

Designed by our co-founder for ergonomics, comfort, and speed.

Smooth handle stirs comfortably, without friction on the hand.
Extra weight and balance help the bar spoon glide effortlessly around your mixing glass, perfectly chilling your drinks.
Easy enough for a beginner but built for experts: The perfect bar spoon for your first cocktail or your busiest shift.
Ultra-durable: Made from stainless steel 304 with a polished mirror finish.

name: A Bar Above Long and Short Picks (Gold)
description:
Get ready to garnish! From the simple-but-classy Martini with an olive to the wildest Bloody Mary, these cocktail picks let your garnish creativity run wild.

Choose the 4" picks for smaller or stemmed glasses like Old Fashioned, lowball, bucket, coupe, martini, or cocktail glasses.  Choose the 8" picks for taller glasses like highballs, Collins, or pint.  Or simply choose the combo set for six of each!

Here's why you're going to love your new picks:

Made to Last: These picks are made from food-grade stainless steel 304.(That's the good stuff!) We even reinforce the welded balls on the end so they are made to last!
Lookin’ Sharp: Sharp enough to pierce the freshest olive, these picks come in two lengths, made to work with any cocktail glass. Dress up your Martini with a classy pick, or go all out and get creative! These picks are ready to take your garnish game to the next level.
Reusable and Environmentally-Friendly: No more plastic in the landfill and no more splinters in your drinks!
Reuse these forever, and you’ll never buy cocktail picks again!
The Host(ess) with the Most(est): Don’t stop with cocktails! These picks are great for sandwiches, appetizers, hors d’oeuvres, and canapés. You can even use them for dips and fondue!

name: Abstinence Blood Orange Aperitif
description:
Product Details:

Every exceptional event or social gathering calls for a top-tier, delectable non-alcoholic aperitif. Abstinence Spirits offers the full richness and intricate flavor complexity without the presence of alcohol. Infused with natural botanicals including Cinchona Bark and notably African Wormwood, providing a distinctive South African twist. It serves as a tantalizing appetizer for guilt-free Spritzes or low-ABV cocktails.

 

How it Tastes:

Delicately sweetened with hints of ginger and mint, providing a refreshing touch. Enjoy it over ice, add club soda for effervescence, or use it as a zero-proof substitute in your preferred cocktail recipes. The ginger's spiciness imparts a comforting warmth with every sip.

 

Ingredients:

Water, vegetable glycerin (soy), natural extracts, natural botanical distillates, citric acid, and potassium sorbate and sodium sorbate as preservatives.

name: Abstinence Cape Agave
description:
Product Details:
Cape Agave, a premium non-alcoholic mezcal alternative that reimagines the intensity and ritual of traditional mezcal with a unique botanical twist. Crafted with African sage, agave, arabica bean, mesquite, and fresh jalapeño, this zero-proof spirit delivers the complexity, depth, and smoky character mezcal lovers crave.

Whether you're mixing up a Spicy Margarita, a Paloma, or enjoying it neat over ice, Cape Agave captures the soul of the agave plant with layered, nuanced flavor. It's perfect for the mindful drinker who refuses to compromise on taste or experience.

 

How it Tastes:
Toasted oak, jalapeno and citrus on the nose with smoky earthiness and a hint of sweetness from the
agave. It is balanced by a firm acidity and complex citrus backbone with a touch of salinity.

 

Ingredients: Filtered water, distilled botanicals, citric acid, salt, agave, cane sugar, natural flavors, mushroom glycolipids.

name: Abstinence Cape Citrus
description:
Product Details:
Abstinence Cape Citrus is an upscale collection of non-alcoholic beverages suitable for any event. Crafted using a specialized distillation technique, this refined range of non-alcoholic drinks offers sophistication.

Capturing the essence of summer, our Abstinence Cape Citrus is a vibrant blend featuring prominent citrus notes alongside spices and aromatic elements. Free from added flavorings or colorings, our beverages are non-alcoholic with zero sugar content.

 

How it Tastes:
A lively citrus blend infused with comforting cinnamon and herbal accents. This concoction offers a harmonious fusion of lemon, orange, and grapefruit flavors, complemented by the comforting warmth of cinnamon and the savory touch of fennel, with a subtle hint of black pepper. It serves as an excellent replacement for citrus-infused vodka or gin in various cocktail recipes.

 

Ingredients:
Citric acid, distilled botanicals, water, and potassium sorbate as preservatives.

name: Abstinence Cape Floral
description:
Product Details:
Abstinence Cape Floral is an exquisitely floral blend, enhanced by juniper berries, angelica root, and coriander, imparting its signature touch with subtle bitterness, herbal nuances, and hints reminiscent of nettle.

A sip reminiscent of the lush blooms of Table Mountain during spring, enriched by the indigenous Cape rose geranium renowned for its heavenly fragrance and distinctive rose-like scent. Free from any added flavorings or colorings, this beverage is non-alcoholic and contains zero sugar.

How it Tastes:
A delicately floral concoction crafted with Juniper berries, Angelica root, and Coriander. Its subtly bitter, herbal profile, reminiscent of faint nettle notes, makes it a perfect match for premium tonics.

Ingredients:
Citric acid, distilled botanicals, water, and potassium sorbate as preservatives.

name: Abstinence Cape Malt
description:
Product Details:
Abstinence Cape Malt is a masterful blend of American bourbon notes and Scottish whiskey influences, offering a bold non-alcoholic spirit experience. Crafted with peated, smoked, and dark toasted malt, this spirit is enriched by a blend of spice botanicals and South African Rooibos. The result is a smooth, richly textured whiskey alternative, featuring mellow vanilla, caramel, and toffee on the nose, with a subtle hint of peated smoke and American oak. A hint of Rooibos adds a unique South African twist, giving it an extra layer of complexity.

Abstinence Cape Malt is a unique blend of peated, smoked, and dark toasted malt, harmoniously married with spice botanicals and South African Honeybush.

 

How it Tastes:
Abstinence Cape Malt offers a complex flavor profile with notes of smoky malt, subtle spice, and a hint of sweetness from the South African Honeybush.

 

Mixing Suggestions:
Add some ice and top with soda for a refreshing twist, or mix with ginger ale and a squeeze of lime for a zesty kick. For an impressive non-alcoholic Old Fashioned, simply follow the recipe. For a decadent treat, mix with honey and vanilla oat milk over ice for a rich and indulgent experience.

 

Ingredients: Smoked Peated and Blended Malts, Oak, Honeybush, Vanilla, Cassia, Cardamom, Clove, Helichrysum Petiolare (Impepho)

name: Abstinence Cape Spice
description:
Product Details:
Abstinence Cape Spice is the perfect non-alcoholic spiced rum alternative, delivering a rich, flavorful experience that’s super mixable and deliciously sippable on its own. Infused with real vanilla and a blend of natural spices, this spirit offers a smooth mouthfeel with delicate sweetness and hints of coconut. Notes of cinnamon, clove, caramelized sugar, dried fruit, and honey dance together with a South African twist from Honeybush, creating a bold flavor profile with layers of complexity. Cape Spice brings a vibrant, warm spice to any occasion, making it the ultimate alcohol-free option for mocktails or simply enjoying over ice.

 

How it Tastes:
Experience the rich, bold flavors of this dark, rum-inspired spirit. You'll be greeted on the nose by smooth vanilla and tropical coconut, with tempting notes of caramel and toffee. A special touch of Honeybush, an indigenous South African plant, adds a unique twist to the aroma.

You'll notice hints of tobacco leaf, burnt sugar, and coconut, followed by a dash of coffee and allspice for a delightful complexity. The finish lingers with gentle woody spice and a touch of oak, offering a satisfying warmth without the alcohol burn.

 

Ingredients:
Water, distilled botanicals (Honeybush, Coconut, Ginger, Allspice, Cassia Bark, Coriander & Molasses.). Sorbate of potassium. 0% sugar, 0% alcohol, zero artificial flavors, colors, or carbohydrates.

name: Abstinence Lemon Aperitif
description:
Product Details:
Abstinence Non-Alcoholic Lemon Aperitif offers a complete richness and intricate flavor profile, minus the alcohol. Combining zesty Lemon with aromatic Buchu, enhanced by Aloe and African Wormwood, it adds a distinctive South African twist to a tantalizing appetizer for guilt-free Spritz or low alcohol by volume cocktails.

 

How it Tastes:
This Lemon Aperitif is brimming with lemon and buchu flavors, along with a medley of herbs and spices including African wormwood, cinchona bark, quinine, and aloe. The outcome is a beverage bursting with citrusy notes, perfect for mixing with sparkling water and ice, or as an ingredient in a lower alcohol by volume cocktail.

 

Ingredients:
Water, potassium sorbate, sodium benzoate, quinine, citric acid, carmoisine, distilled botanicals, and natural flavoring.

name: After Dream Calamansi Lime - 10MG
description:
Product Details:

Afterdream Calamansi Lime is a microdosed, non-alcoholic cannabis beverage designed to help you unwind with intention. Crafted with organic hemp-derived THC and CBD, this functional drink delivers a gentle, balanced lift that promotes relaxation without clouding your clarity. Formulated with L-theanine for calm focus and organic lion's mane mushroom for mental clarity with no alcohol, no hangover, no artificial anything. Third-party tested and federally legal. 10mg THC | 20mg CBD per 12oz can.

 

How it Tastes:

Clean, zesty calamansi lime opens bright and tart, layered with subtle citrus complexity and a crisp effervescent finish. Light, refreshing, and effortlessly drinkable — with delicate herbal undertones that deepen with each sip.

 

Ingredients:

Sparkling water, organic hemp-derived cannabis extract (THC, CBD), organic lion's mane mushroom, L-theanine, natural lime flavor, citric acid. Non-GMO, vegan, gluten-free. No artificial sweeteners, flavors, or additives.

 

✓ Light, mood lifting high
✓ Calm, focused state of mind
✓ Refreshing citrus flavor, no bitterness
✓ Hangover-free, alcohol-free unwind

 

Certificate of Analysis

Whether enjoyed alone or with a partner, the Alice Mushroom Arousal elixir promises to awaken the senses and elevate your intimate experiences to new heights.

Vegan free, Gluten free

The Alice Mushroom Arousal elixir boasts a unique and tantalizing taste, blending earthy notes with subtle hints of arousal-enhancing ingredients, creating a delightful and stimulating experience.

Vegan, Gluten free

 

How it Tastes:
The Alice Mushroom Nightcap offers a unique and earthy taste, with subtle hints of mushroom and calming herbs that complement its relaxing effects.

name: Alice Mushroom Party Trick | Chocolates
description:
Product Details:
When you walk into a room, you deserve to feel confidently connected, energized, and genuinely present — without leaning on alcohol or sugary drinks. That’s exactly why Alice created Party Trick, a playful, all-natural dark chocolate designed to elevate your mood, boost social ease, and make every gathering feel effortless and unforgettable.

Crafted with functional mushrooms like Cordyceps and mood-enhancing botanicals such as kanna, mucuna pruriens, and gotu kola, each bite helps target the neurotransmitters that shape confidence, connection, and good vibes — all with less caffeine than a sip of green tea and zero intoxicating substances. With a surprising pop-rocks sensation for instant sensory delight, Party Trick gives you the relaxed energy to dance, laugh, and mingle. It’s social elevation in a one gorgeous square of chocolate.

Vegan free, Gluten free

 

How it Tastes: The Alice Mushroom Party Trick features a 72% dark chocolate base with a unique, popping-candy texture and a taste often described as rich and slightly nutty.

 

Ingredients: Cordyceps (fruiting body), l-taurine, kanna, macuna pruriens, gotu kola, organic guayusa leaf, popping rocks other ingredients: organic semi-sweet 72% dark chocolate (organic unsweetened chocolate, organic cane sugar, organic cocoa butter), carbonated popping rocks (cane sugar, lactose [milk], corn syrup solids, cocoa butter, and powdered sugar)

name: Alice Mushroom Zen-X |  Chocolates
description:
Product Details: 

Alice invented Zen-X, a smooth flow of midday calm and clarity in the form of a decadent, all-natural dark chocolate bite that helps melt tension while keeping your mind present and focused.  Each square of Zen-X is formulated to support healthy cortisol levels and promote relaxed focus both instantly and over time. The long-term benefits come from functional mushrooms like Reishi and Tremella, L-Theanine, Rhodiola, saffron, kanna, and magnesium all help dial down stress and mental noise in the moment without drowsiness. The result is an indulgent daily ritual that not only soothes your mind but also keeps you grounded and collected through the day’s ups and downs. 

Vegan free, Gluten free

 

How it Tastes: The Zen-X boasts a unique dark chocolate taste, with earthy notes and subtle hints of plant enhancing ingredients, creating a delightful and zen like experience.

Ingredients: Tremella (fruiting body), reishi (fruiting body), l-theanine, kanna, rhodiola, saffron magnesium glycinate other ingredients: organic semi-sweet 72% dark chocolate (organic unsweetened chocolate, organic cane sugar, organic cocoa butter), coconut oil, cocoa butter

name: Alice Mushrooms Brainstorm | Chocolates
description:
Product Details:

Your morning beverage has worn off and your focus is waning, but the clock says there’s more day to seize.  Each bite of Brainstorm is formulated to boost long-term cognitive function while also delivering an immediate boost to focus and energy levels. The long term benefits come from our functional mushrooms. Lion’s Mane and Cordyceps are felt over time — not instantly. When incorporated into a daily routine, the mushrooms’ nutrients compound in your body and become more effective (and noticeable) with sustained use.

Nothing beats instant gratification. That’s why we’ve added Guarana and Phosphaditylserine to our formula. Guarana is a caffeinated Brazilian berry that provides a smooth flow of energy, and Phosphaditylserine is a fatty acid that improves alertness, reaction time, thinking speed, and focus throughout the day. Each square contains 66mg of natural caffeine which is equivalent to ⅔ cup of coffee.

Vegan free, Gluten free

 

How it Tastes:
The Alice Brainstorm chocolates boast a unique and tantalizing taste, blending earthy notes with subtle hints of focus-enhancing ingredients, creating a delightful and stimulating experience. 

 

Ingredients: Fairly traded organic dark chocolate, organic Lion’s Mane and organic Cordyceps from 100% fruiting body mushrooms, guarana and phosphatidylserine. Each square contains 66mg of natural caffeine which is equivalent to ⅔ cup of coffee.

name: Almave  Ámbar
description:
Product Details:

Almave Ámbar is the world's first super-premium non-alcoholic aged-style Blue Agave spirit, handcrafted in the highlands of Jalisco, Mexico. Created by Master Distiller Iván Saldaña and co-created with Lewis Hamilton, Ámbar follows the same traditional Blue Agave distillation process as Blanco — with the addition of French oak hydrolate and natural oak tannins to deliver the warmth and complexity of a rested tequila, without a drop of alcohol. The perfect non-alcoholic spirit for sipping neat, on the rocks, or in a sophisticated cocktail. <0.5% ABV. 700ml, approximately 12 servings.

 

How it Tastes:

Rich, warming, and beautifully complex — caramel and vanilla lead the aromatics, followed by bold notes of brown sugar, toasted wood, allspice, and a whisper of cacao on the finish. Smooth, indulgent, and made for slow sipping.

 

Ingredients: 

Blue agave hydrolate, water, concentrated blue agave extract, glycerol, agave syrup, apple cider vinegar, French oak hydrolate, natural aromas, citric acid, malic acid, oak tannins, salt, natural glycolipids.

name: Almave Blanco
description:
Product Details:

Almave Blanco is the world's first super-premium non-alcoholic Blue Agave spirit, handcrafted in the highlands of Jalisco, Mexico — the heartland of tequila. Created by Master Distiller Iván Saldaña with over 20 years of tequila-making expertise, Almave captures the soul of Blue Agave by following traditional harvesting, cooking, and distillation techniques — skipping only the fermentation step that creates alcohol. The result is a complex, character-filled non-alcoholic tequila alternative that mixes beautifully in any cocktail. <0.5% ABV. 700ml, approximately 12 servings.

 

How it Tastes: 

Bright, fresh, and vibrantly agave-forward — crisp minerality and natural spice balance a subtle sweetness, with fruity aromatics and a clean, lightly bitter finish. Best mixed in a Margarita, Paloma, or your favorite tequila cocktail.

 

Ingredients: 

Blue agave hydrolate, water, blue agave syrup, glycerol, natural aromas, arabic gum, malic acid, citric acid, salt, tannins.

name: Almave Humo
description:
Product Details:

Almave Humo is the world's only non-alcoholic smoky agave spirit, distilled from premium Espadín agave in Puebla, Mexico — following the same time-honored techniques used in traditional mezcal production, without the alcohol. Crafted by Master Distiller Iván Saldaña, Humo is the natural next step for agave lovers who want the earthy, smoky complexity of a great mezcal — guilt-free and hangover-free. Use it anywhere you'd reach for mezcal. <0.5% ABV. 700ml (23.7oz).

 

How it Tastes: 

Crystal-clear with roasted agave, earthy smoke, and natural minerals on the nose. The palate opens with herbal warmth and subtle piloncillo sweetness, with smoked tropical fruit — pineapple and lime — dancing through to a long, satisfying smoky finish.

 

Ingredients: 

Espadín agave, organic agave nectar, glycerol, malic acid, citric acid, salt, natural flavors, natural mushroom extract, glycolipids (to preserve freshness).

The addition of Motueka hops adds a unique tropical lime aroma and flavor, making it a crisp and invigorating choice for any occasion.

Water, yeast, barley, hops.

description: Best Day's Galaxy Ripple is a bold and vibrant double IPA made with Galaxy Hops that bursts with tropical and piney hop aromas. name: Best Day Hazy IPA
description: Best Day's Hazy IPA has rich, fruity aromas that are followed by round and juicy tropical hop flavors that fill the palate leading to a subtle bitterness on the finish. Its luscious medium body has a smooth, complex citrus flavor with a full and lively mouthfeel and a dry finish.

name: Best Day Hazy IPA
description: Best Day's Hazy IPA has rich, fruity aromas that are followed by round and juicy tropical hop flavors that fill the palate leading to a subtle bitterness on the finish. Its luscious medium body has a smooth, complex citrus flavor with a full and lively mouthfeel and a dry finish.

name: Best Day Kolsch
description: Best Day's Kölsch is light, crisp, and easy drinking with a nice toasty malt character and lighter hopping. We use a combination of Cologne and Pilsner Malts and Hallertau Traditional hops to create a refreshingly complex Kölsch-style ale. The crisp and clean finish leaves you wanting another sip.

name: Best Day Kolsch
description: Best Day's Kölsch is light, crisp, and easy drinking with a nice toasty malt character and lighter hopping. description:
Best Day’s Pilsner is made with a true Bavarian lager yeast and herbal hallertau mittelfruh hops. The combination presents a clean woody and crisp citrus beer with a trailing maltiness and distinct hop character. 

Ingredients: Bavarian Lager Yeast, Hallertau Mittelfrüh Hops, Malt (Specific Malt Types)

name: Best Day Variety 12pk
description: Enjoy all 4 of Best Day's brews in our variety twelve-pack. There are 3 each of our Kölsch, West Coast IPA, Hazy IPA, and Electro-Lime styles.

name: Best Day West Coast IPA
description: Best Day's West Coast IPA is a tribute to our backyard and its rich history of making damn good beers. It starts with the classic Cascade Hop aromas of Citrus and Pine and a bite on the front end. Middle hopping flavors balance with the malt to leave a nice hint of a lingering hop finish.

name: Bittermilk Manhattan
description:
Bittermilk perfectly captures the essence of a classic Manhattan cocktail as a non-alcoholic elixir. Using port wine (alcohol-removed), grapes, raisins and our No.1 Bitter Formula to replicate the sweet vermouth flavor, enhanced with a bit of cherry. Aged in Willett bourbon barrels, it gains charred oak and vanilla notes, while their trademark No.1 Bitter Formula adds complex bitterness for balance.

Ingredients: Water, Florida Raw Cane Sugar, Burnt Cane Sugar, Raisin Juice Concentrate, Burnt Sugar, Alcohol Removed Port Wine, Cherry Juice Concentrate, Tartaric Acid, Vanilla Extract, Grape Juice Concentrate, Orange Peel, Spices, Gentian Root, Cinchona Bark

name: Bittermilk No. 1 Old Fashioned
description:
Product Details:
Bittermilk No. 1 Bourbon Barrel Aged Old Fashioned offers a sophisticated twist on the classic cocktail.

It combines premium bourbon with raw demerara sugar, orange peel, and aromatic bitters, all aged in small batch bourbon barrels to create a rich, complex flavor profile that's perfect for sipping neat or as a base for your favorite cocktails.

How it Tastes:
The taste of Bittermilk No. 1 Bourbon Barrel Aged Old Fashioned is characterized by its rich and complex flavor profile. It features the smoothness of premium bourbon, complemented by the sweetness of raw demerara sugar, the citrusy notes of orange peel, and the depth of aromatic bitters.

This combination creates a balanced and sophisticated taste experience that's perfect for sipping and savoring.

Ingredients:
Tartaric acid, gentian root, cinnamon bark, water, orange peel, spices, and Florida golden cane and burned cane sugar.

name: Bittermilk No. 2 Tom Collins
description:
Not just your grandma's Tom Collins, we've made a refreshing Collins with floral and citrus notes. Using Centennial hops as the bittering agent prized for it's aggressive floral characteristics. Mixes best with light spirits.

Ingredients
Fresh Lemon Juice, Water, Florida Golden Cane Sugar, Natural Extract of Elderflower and Elderberry, Centennial Hops

name: Bittermilk No. 3 Smoked Honey Whiskey Sour
description:
Product Details:
Bittermilk No. 3 Smoked Honey Whiskey Sour Mixer is a carefully crafted blend that reimagines the classic whiskey sour with a smoky twist.

Infused with smoked honey, fresh lemon juice, and aromatic bitters, this mixer delivers a harmonious balance of sweetness, tartness, and depth of flavor, perfect for creating sophisticated cocktails at home.

How it Tastes:
The Bittermilk No. 3 Smoked Honey Whiskey Sour Mixer boasts a unique taste profile, featuring the rich smokiness of honey, the tartness of fresh lemon juice, and the complexity of aromatic bitters.

This creates a harmonious blend of sweet, tangy, and smoky flavors that elevate the classic whiskey sour to new heights.

Ingredients:
Water, Florida Golden Cane Sugar, Bourbon Barrel Smoked Georgia Honey, and Fresh Orange Peel.

name: Bittermilk No. 5 Charred Grapefruit Tonic
description:
Not your typical tonic, the No.5 combines lime and lemon juice with cinchona bark, the source of quinine for tonic. We peel fresh grapefruits and char the skins to help bring out bitter yet refreshing notes. Just a bit of local Bulls Bay Saltworks sea salt helps pull savory caramel notes and rounds out flavor. Works well with any light spirit. Build over ice equal parts No.5 + vodka + soda water in a tall glass. Garnish with a lime wedge.

Ingredients
Fresh Lime and Lemon Juices, Florida Golden Cane Sugar, Charred Grapefruit Peel, Cinchona Bark, Spices, Bulls Bay Sea Salt

name: Bittermilk No.6 Oaxacan Old Fashioned
description:

It combines smoky mezcal with spicy chocolate and bitter orange, creating a complex and flavorful profile that elevates any cocktail experience.

How it Tastes:
The taste of Bittermilk No. 6 Oaxacan Old Fashioned is a rich and complex blend of smoky mezcal, spicy chocolate, and bitter orange, creating a uniquely flavorful experience that balances sweetness with depth and warmth.

Ingredients:
Dried Chiles, Spices, Cinchona Bark, Organic Raisins, Fresh Lemon Peel, French Broad Chocolate Cocoa Nibs & Fines, and Tartaric Acid.

name: Broccoli #03 Magazine
description:
Presenting a new perspective on cannabis, Broccoli magazine is playful, informed, eclectic, and thoughtful; it encourages the discovery and intelligent appreciation of cannabis through explorations of art, culture, and fashion. Inside each collectible issue, readers can find a mix of interviews, photo essays, articles, and plenty of delightful surprises, making it a magazine to rival a coffee table book.

In Broccoli Issue 03, Fieldwork Flowers crafts cannabis cyanotypes from Anna Atkins’ blue dreams, Hisako Nakatani weaves the mystical and practical legacy of hemp in Japanese culture, and The Family Acid visualizes counterculture. Plus, Lady Fancy Nails’ 4:20 manicures, two writers on shifting perspectives, Madeline Gins’ Site of Reversible Destiny, a voyage to the Milky Way, and musings on mood rings.

88 pages, perfect bound, with shiny foil logo on cover and premium art paper inside.

name: Bull in China Black Matte Shaker
description:
Bring out your inner bartender and make drinks like a pro!

Shaker tins are the flashy workhorse of any reputable bar. Ours are battle-tested and fit together like they were made for each other (because they were). This set includes one 28oz. base and one 18oz. “cheater” tin. Those weighted ends help control your shake and rhythm every step of the way.
What's unique about ours? 

-Welded Weighted Bottoms: You don't have to worry about these bottoms falling off

-Tight Seal, Easy to Open: Provides a perfect seal for shaking, while opening quickly & smoothly for bartending efficiency

-Optimally Balanced: Designed by pros for that Goldie Locks combination of premium quality weight without going overboard, so you can keep shaking all night.

Our silver tins our perfectly dishwasher safe, but we recommend handwashing our other tins to extend the life of those finishes.

name: Bull in China Hawthrone Strainer Black
description:
Our Hawthorne Strainers are made with bartenders in mind.

The Specs:

  • Shorter, low profile design.
  • A hole in the handle is perfect for hanging up while resting between cocktails (or when resting between shifts)
  • An extra dense coil for straining. Trust us, you won’t go back to the cheaper versions.
  • A nice wider body to fit on top of any mixing glass or shaker tin on the market without having to worry about side leakage, or—worse yet, dropping the strainer into the glass or tin
  • Made in the US - From the body, to the coil, to the box it comes in, these are 100% American

name: Bull In China Japanese Style Jigger Black
description:
Our Japanese jiggers deliver professional-grade precision whether you’re behind the bar or mixing at home. Durable, perfectly weighted, and easy to read, this cocktail measuring tool combines precision and beauty for consistent pours every time.

Professional Precision: Internal lines at ¼, ½, ¾, and 1½ ounces make measuring effortless and exact — no guesswork, no surprises. (And don't forget, filling them to the top of each side gets you a perfect 1oz and 2oz measure as well)

Balanced Design: The tall, tapered shape offers excellent control and a comfortable grip, whether you’re slinging rounds or crafting one perfect cocktail.

Premium Materials: Not only do we have our stainless steel versions, check out our other listings for 100% Copper, 100% Brass, and our striking Mother of Pearl finish. They're all built to look sharp and stand up to years of service.

Bartender-Born, Industry-Tested: Designed by working pros who know what tools need to survive a double shift and still shine on your home bar.

name: Busty Lush She's Glamorous - Grapefruit Paloma
description:
Product Details:
Introducing the latest addition to Busty Lush's fabulous mocktail lineup: She's Glamorous Grapefruit Paloma! This premixed non-alcoholic cocktail bursts with vibrant grapefruit, lime, and authentic agave flavors.

This timeless cocktail keeps it simple, sans the alcohol, for a refreshing and classic taste experience.

How it Tastes:
Full of lively, succulent grapefruit, lime, and authentic agave flavors, this uncomplicated, timeless cocktail eliminates only one ingredient - the alcohol. Our Paloma is pre-mixed for convenience, though we recommend serving it over ice with a garnish of fresh grapefruit or lime.

Ingredients:
Water, fruit and vegetable-derived color, organic agave syrup, natural flavors of lime, lemon, and grapefruit, citric acid, and other natural tastes.

description:
Product Details:
Busty Lush - She's Lavish | Indulge in this opulent lavender-infused margarita, a refreshing delight suitable for any occasion. Experience a symphony of flavors as delicate floral lavender intertwines with the zesty citrus kick of a traditional margarita.

Each sip offers a fusion of aromatic lavender and tangy lime, crafting an indulgent and revitalizing beverage experience.

How it Tastes:
Savor the delicate hint of lavender combined with zesty lemon and lime, and delicately sweetened with genuine organic agave. Butterfly pea flower tea lends a purple hue to this lovely, effervescent cocktail.

Ingredients:
Water, sea salt, citric acid, lavender, lime, lemon, organic agave syrup, butterfly pea flower tea, and additional natural tastes.

name: Buzzkill Sauvignon Blanc
description:
Buzzkill Sauvignon Blanc is an alcohol-removed (<.5% ABV) still wine with classic Northern California Sauvignon Blanc characteristics. Expect a dry wine that’s juicy on the palate with vibrant acidity and thirst-quenching properties.

What's in the box: Each 4-pack box contains four cans of alcohol-removed Sauvignon Blanc. Each can is 8.4 fl. oz of wine, or 1.5 standard glasses of wine, and contains only 40 calories and 3 grams of sugar. 

Ingredients: Dealcoholized Sauvignon Blanc wine, grape juice concentrate, natural flavors, gum arabic. Buzzkill Wines Sauvignon Blanc is low sugar, gluten-free, and vegan.

name: Caleno Dark & Spicy
description:
Product Details:
A tropical non-alcoholic rum inspired by the sun-drenched flavors and rhythms of Colombia is called Caleño Dark And Spicy!

How it Tastes:
The tongue is filled with the bold flavors of pineapple and coconut, which are complemented by ginger, kola nut, lime, black cardamom, and a hint of sweetness.

Ingredients:
A blend of water, glycerin, and botanical distillates such as pineapple, coconut, kola nut, and black cardamom. Natural flavorings, citric acid, sodium benzoate, and potassium sorbate as preservatives.

name: CeroCero Hibiscus & Lingonberry
description:
CeroCero Hibiscus & Lingonberry is an enchanting mix of vibrant botanicals entwine with heady floral notes of hibiscus and tangy lingonberry for an exotic, citrus-bright taste that lingers long on the tongue. The water at the heart of this botanical fusion has percolated through the Cairngorm mountains for 50 years, adding a touch of pure wonder to every drop.

These alcohol free spirits are lovingly handcrafted for a low calorie, low sugar, vegan, gluten-free, and Halal gin alternative. It is ideal for abstainers, moderators, and the sober curious. Elevate your non alcoholic drinks experience with new tales of taste. CeroCero is made for mixing. Start your own story by pouring a shot over ice and topping up with tonic for an exotically refreshing drink packed with flavor and personality. Stir your imagination.

name: CeroCero Juniper, White Grapefruit, & Lemongrass
description: Experience the award-winning taste of CeroCero Grapefruit, a premium handcrafted non-alcoholic gin that has earned 90 points at the prestigious San Francisco World Spirits Competition. This botanical fantasy is made with water that has naturally filtered through the Cairngorm mountains for over 50 years, lending each drop a unique purity. Refresh your palate with a beautifully balanced blend of bright grapefruit and aromatic Indian lemongrass layered over a classic juniper base. Light yet bursting with vibrant citrus flavor, this spirit is perfect for those seeking a sophisticated alcohol-free alternative. Low calorie, low sugar, vegan, gluten-free, and Halal certified, it’s crafted for moderators, abstainers, and the sober curious looking to elevate their mixology experience.

Ingredients: Dealcoholized wine, rectified concentrated grape must, carbon dioxide, preservative: sulfites.

description:
Product Details:

How it Tastes:
Our blend of Pinot Blanc and Silvaner grapes presents a demi-sec, medium sweet drink with a prominent honey aroma and flavors of citrus, green apple, pear, and peach. As it touches the palate, it transitions to a delightful, invigorating acidity, offering a refreshing sensation.

Ingredients:
Wine with alcohol removed, grape must, concentrated grape must that has been corrected, carbon dioxide, and sulfite preservative.

Product Details: Introducing Curious Zero, a booze-free Lion's Mane Lager that's beautifully brewed to boost body and mind. Exquisitely crafted, yet easy drinking any day or night. We brew roasted barley with Yakima hops and golden apple, then infuse it with lime and two powerful adaptogens: lion's mane mushrooms for your brain and maca root for muscle recovery and to lift your libido. It's not a beer, it's a boost. Gluten-free, Zero alcohol.

How it Tastes: Prepare to experience a sophisticated lager that's refreshing and rejuvenating. Curious Zero delivers the crispness of a traditional craft brew with subtle hops and gentle malt sweetness, complemented by hints of golden apple and lime. The finish lands with a brain-bright lift that sharpens the moment, offering a focused flow state without the booze.

Ingredients: Carbonated filtered water, roasted barley, Yakima hops, golden apple, clarified lime, maca root extract, lion's mane mushroom extract, American oak, sea salt, and a curated selection of botanicals.

Infused with a trio of adaptogenic mushrooms—reishi, chaga, and lion's mane—to help you unwind and boost your body's natural immunity. Zero alcohol.

How it Tastes: Prepare to be dazzled by Curious No. 8, a richly balanced bittersweet experience that stunts your senses and soothes your spirit. name: Drinks For Every Season Book
description:
A stunning, seasonally-driven drink recipe book featuring cocktails and nonalcoholic drinks for at-home enjoyment and special occasions.

With more than 100 recipes for seasonally-inspired drinks, this comprehensive drink recipe book is an invitation for home bartenders to serve up cocktails and mocktails for every occasion. In spring, try an herbaceous gin drink such as A Meadow for Eeyore or a light classic like the French 75. In summer, mix up alfresco-worthy cocktails like an Espresso Martini or Champagne Cobbler. Take advantage of the Fall harvest with Autumn-inspired libations such as the Smoky Pumpkin or Pomme d’Amour. And in winter, cozy up with Baltimore Eggnog or an Apple Hot Toddy.

Also included are bar guides for glassware, mixers, garnishes, ice, and golden ratios for cocktails—as well as tips for batching drinks for crowds and serving drinks responsibly.

This indispensable guide will become your go-to reference for serving up fantastic drinks, no matter the season.

name: Duju Sparkling Wine
description:
MADE WITH ORGANIC FRENCH GRAPES

Rooted in the world’s premier winemaking region, Duju starts with organic French grapes to ensure every sip is as pure as it is sophisticated. No shortcuts, just heritage.

Duju's non-alcoholic sparkling is crafted in France from organic Sauvignon Blanc grapes, honoring the craft of great wine. The fruit is fermented at low temperatures to retain primary flavors before gentle de-alcoholization via vacuum distillation.

We intentionally focus on building texture and crisp acidity (two vital elements usually lacking in NA) to ensure a complex, sophisticated sip. The outcome is a truly clean taste that contains 25% less sugar than the average NA wine.

Take one to gently ease into a relaxed state, whether you're enjoying a quiet evening or setting the mood for deep conversation. Two or three offer a more profound escape, ideal for melting away stress and preparing for a restful night.

Infused with the juicy sweetness of ripe peach, these gummies bring a touch of botanical tranquility to every bite. With 20 precisely dosed cubes per pack, you have the freedom to find your perfect dose and let go at your own pace.

One gummy is the perfect dose to subtly enhance everyday moments—whether you're out for a walk, tackling creative projects, or unwinding after work. Take two or three for a deeper, more immersive escape when you want to fully relax and reset.

Infused with the bright, citrusy essence of yuzu, these gummies deliver a refreshing, sophisticated twist on relaxation. With 20 precisely dosed cubes per pack, you have the freedom to customize your experience with ease.

name: Eat Gold Organics: Be Happy
description:
Product Details:

Be Happy is a potent, functional chocolate bar formulated to elevate your mood. Indulge in 4+ squares and enjoy being alive — living your life in full color. Chocolate makes you happy all on its own, but Eat Gold Organics has taken it one step further: with goji berries, adaptogen-rich mushrooms and tyrosine, Be Happy is a recipe for even stronger feel-good vibes.

How it Tastes:

Rich, organic specialty cacao forms the indulgent base of this mood-boosting chocolate bar. Goji berries add a subtle fruity brightness, while lion's mane mushroom and tyrosine work quietly in the background — letting the deep, smooth chocolate take center stage.

Ingredients:

Organic specialty cacao, organic coconut sugar, organic cacao butter, organic goji berries, organic lion's mane mushroom, tyrosine.

name: Eat Gold Organics: Big Orgasm
description:
Product Details:

Big Orgasm is a potent, functional chocolate bar formulated to support an increased libido and stimulate your sexual and creative energy. Indulge in 4+ squares and enjoy whatever comes your way. You deserve pleasure and mind-altering inspiration — and libido-supporting ingredients like maca, cayenne, wild strawberries, and adaptogenic mushrooms can help you achieve more, more, more.

How it Tastes:

Rich, dark organic cacao forms the indulgent base, while wild strawberries add a bright fruity lift. Cayenne brings a slow, warming heat that builds with each square — bold, complex, and just a little dangerous.

Ingredients:

Organic specialty cacao, organic coconut sugar, organic cacao butter, organic wild strawberries, organic maca, organic cordyceps, organic cayenne pepper.

name: Eat Gold Organics: Create Magic
description:
Product Details:

Create Magic is a potent, functional chocolate bar formulated to inspire creative flow and focus. Indulge in 4+ squares and create magic in work and play. Boost motivation and focus with functional micro-dosing — Create Magic is complete with matcha powder, citicoline, and adaptogenic lion's mane mushroom.

How it Tastes:

Smooth, rich dark chocolate opens with a subtle earthiness from lion's mane, followed by a clean, grassy lift from organic matcha. Light and focused — the kind of bar that tastes like getting things done.

Ingredients:

Organic specialty cacao, organic coconut sugar, organic cacao butter, organic matcha, organic lion's mane, citicoline.

name: Eat Gold Organics: Stay Sane
description:
Product Details:

Stay Sane is a potent, functional chocolate bar formulated to promote calm, grounding, and emotional balance. Indulge in 4+ squares when the world feels like too much. Packed with powerful healing adaptogens and nootropics — including ashwagandha and SAM-e — Stay Sane is your daily reset in chocolate form.

How it Tastes:

eep, smooth dark chocolate with a warming hint of cinnamon that makes this one a crowd favorite at every tasting. Comforting, familiar, and just a little bit magical.

Ingredients:

Organic specialty cacao, organic coconut sugar, organic cacao butter, ashwagandha, cinnamon, SAM-e.

name: Eat Gold Organics: Sweet Dreams
description:
Product Details:

Sweet Dreams is a potent, functional chocolate bar formulated to promote deeper, more restful sleep. Indulge in 4+ squares before bed and ease into a peaceful slumber. Forget the chill pill — try a chill chocolate. Sweet Dreams features melatonin-supporting almonds, calming reishi mushroom, and tryptophan to send you nodding off to dreamland.

How it Tastes:

Velvety dark chocolate with a subtle nuttiness from organic almonds and a gentle, earthy warmth from reishi. Smooth and soothing — the perfect nightcap.

Ingredients:

Organic specialty cacao, organic coconut sugar, organic cacao butter, organic almonds, organic reishi mushroom, tryptophan.

name: Eat Gold: Menopausal Goddess
description:
Product Details:

Menopausal Goddess is a potent, functional chocolate bar formulated to support you on your journey to balance in this new, powerful chapter. Indulge in 4+ squares, take a breath, and find your inner goddess. Rich in bee pollen, chaga, and lavender (all linked to menopause relief) Menopausal Goddess helps turn down the heat and restore your inner calm.

How it Tastes:

Smooth, rich dark chocolate with delicate floral notes from organic lavender and a subtly sweet earthiness from chaga and bee pollen. Elegant, grounding, and made entirely for you.

Ingredients:

Organic specialty cacao, organic coconut sugar, organic cacao butter, organic chaga, organic bee pollen, organic lavender.

name: Fabbri Amarena Cherries
description:
The AMARENA FABBRI is the pinnacle of cherry indulgence, adaptable to a variety of uses that food industry aficionados want to create memorable culinary delights. The Amarena cherry is a gastronomic pleasure at its finest! It is a cherry delicacy of sweet and tart balance that is not to be confused with your common cherry or even the maraschino. The Fabbri family classic 1915 "Original Wild Cherry in Syrup" always has been and still is produced in Bologna, Italy.

  • AUTHENTIC ITALIAN AMARENA CHERRIES
    Imported from Italy. Amarena Fabbri Wild Cherries in Syrup are candied and immersed in syrup. Our cherries are the perfect balance of sweet and tart. Amarena cherries are unlike your common cocktail cherry or maraschino cherries. When you're looking to impress, take your cocktails to the next level with our authentic Italian Amarena cherries.

  • VERSATILE GARNISH FOR COCKTAILS & DESSERTS
    Amarena Fabbri Wild Cherries in Syrup can be used in many ways. These cherries are the perfect cocktail cherries to garnish your Old Fashioned or Manhattan. They go great with bourbon, whiskey, brandy, and other liqueur. Try our cherries as a delicious topping for gelato, ice cream, cheesecake, and other desserts.

  • MADE IN ITALY SINCE 1915
    Italian tradition and passion for over 100 years. Amarena Fabbri Wild Cherries in Syrup are Made in Italy with the same authentic recipe that Gennaro Fabbri used since 1915. These cocktail cherries are the perfect, classy cocktail garnish for your parties and gatherings. You'll find our Amarena cherries at upscale bars and restaurants all over the world.

  • AN ICONIC DESIGN
    Steeped in tradition, Amarena Fabbri Cherries and our iconic jar represent an authentic Italian style and flavor that is beloved for generations. The distinctive Amarena Fabbri Jar has become a lasting icon of Italian tradition and quality. Fabbri products have been featured in classic Italian TV and artwork, from TV shows to cartoons and paintings, Fabbri is a true Italian icon.

  • 100 PERCENT NATURAL
    Amarena Cherries are 100% natural, Gluten Free, and certified Kosher. Fabbri products are trusted and used by international bartenders, baristas, and pastry chefs. Following in the footsteps of Gennaro Fabbri, we are defined by our commitment to high quality. Bring an authentic taste of Italy home with these delicious and flavorful cherries.

name: Fabbri Candied Ginger
description:
Fabbri 1905 always pays attention to the latest trend to come up with the best products for its customers. Zenzero Fabbri was born out of the same cooking process of Amarena Fabbri and it presents itself as delicious golden nuggets immersed in a unique ginger and turmeric syrup, mixing sweet and spicy together. Thanks to its characteristics, Zenzero Fabbri is very versatile: it can be used in cocktails, desserts, fruit salads, and much more.

  • A new product with an old recipe: our ginger is slowly cooked (10 days) with the same process of our Amarena Fabbri
  • The flavor is surprisingly refreshing, not overly sweet, spicy with a hint of turmeric at the end
  • A versatile product for your meals, desserts, and cocktails. Perfect for your Gin Tonic and Moscow Mule
  • All natural: NO artificial preservatives, NO artificial colors or flavors (NO GMO)
  • Gluten Free - Kosher

name: Fabbri Fragola Strawberries
description:
After the great success of its Amarena, Fabbri 1905 decided to try the same cooking process on other fruits and that is how our strawberries in syrup came to life. Fragola Fabbri presents itself as deliciously sweet thanks to the high-quality syrup strawberries are immersed into. Fragola Fabbri keeps the same fragrance and flavor of fresh fruit, sweet with a sour aftertaste. It is perfect for your cakes, on top of ice cream and yogurt, in your fruity cocktails or straight from the jar.

  • Delicious with ice cream, cakes, fruit salads, yogurts, milk shakes - for toppings, recipes or right from the jar
  • All Natural, Gluten Free, Non GMO, Kosher (Star K)

name: Fantastic Fungi Book
description:
"A masterpiece. The Fantastic Fungi Community Cookbook is, by far, the best culinary guide to cooking and pairing mushrooms. . . . This book makes me so hungry, I want to eat it."
— Paul Stamets, mycologist and author of Mycelium Running: HowMushrooms Can Help Save the World

THIS ONE-OF-A-KIND COMMUNITY-DRIVEN COOKBOOK, EDITED BY AUTHOR EUGENIA BONE, FEATURES OVER 100 MUSHROOM-CENTRIC RECIPES FROM APPETIZERS AND MAINS TO DESSERTS AND DRINKS.

The Fantastic Fungi Community Cookbook is written by the people who know mushroom cooking best — mushroom lovers These are the kinds of recipes you will actually cook for dinner: tried-and-true, family recipes representing cultures from all over the world. Recipes include:

- Black Trumpet and Fig Pizza

- Lobster Mushroom Chowdah

- Chicken Chanterelle Paprikash

- Chaga Chocolate Chip Cookies

The cookbook also features five thoughtful and engaging essays written by Eugenia that explore a wide range of topics, including mushroom cultivation and foraging. Following the path set by Louie Schwartzberg's award-winning documentary, this cookbook will expand your appreciation of the fantastic world of fungi, their different tastes and varieties, and their many applications, from flavoring drinks to replacing meat in recipes. The most diverse and comprehensive mushroom cookbook available, the Fantastic Fungi Community Cookbook is the perfect gift for anyone who is curious about the marvelous world of mushrooms and the magic they can make in the kitchen.

name: Farewell Party Candles
description:

Each set includes six 1.6" tall gravestones mounted on wooden picks—perfect when facing the cold, hard truth: you’re closer to the grave than the rave. description: The fiery, full-bodied taste of Premium Ginger Beer, balanced with the subtle citrus flavor of Italian Blood Orange. Not too sweet on the palate and specifically made to be mixed, but equally delicious on its own.

description: Essential oils, including from handpicked English elderflowers create a unique, floral balance for the gentle bitterness of the finest quinine from central Africa.

description: Crafted by brewing our signature blend of three gingers from the Ivory Coast, Nigeria and Cochin, India. Not too sweet on the palate, this bold and refreshing non-alcoholic Ginger Beer has a deep, long-lasting ginger character.

description: Delicate and fresh with crisp notes of cucumber essence from Florida, blended with the gentle bitterness of quinine of the finest quality from Central Africa.

description: A delicious sparkling made with a refreshing upfront burst of fresh grapefruit, carefully balanced with soft pink grapefruit floral notes. The perfect levels of carbonation provide a rounded base which complements the best premium tequilas and vodkas for a refreshing, light spritz.

name: Fever Tree Tonic Water
description: Made with the finest quinine from central Africa and a touch of Mexican bitter orange for a refreshing, subtle citrus taste & aroma.

name: Figlia 001. Fiore Aperitivo
description:
Product Details:
With a few unique twists, Figlia non-alcoholic is a non-alcoholic tribute to the traditional spritz.

The expectations for this fragrant and floral-forward Aperitivo are established by the term "Fiore," which translates to "flower" in Italian. Figlia advises you to take your time and to toast with intention with each sip.

How it Tastes:
With bitter orange, roses, cinnamon, clove, and ginger up front, it's strong, and the finish is light, fruity, and luscious with pomegranate and strawberries.

Ingredients:
Filtered Water, Black Currant Juice Concentrate, Ginseng Root, Chamomile Extract, Bitter Orange Rind, Clove, Fruit & Vegetable Extract (For Color), White Grape Juice Concentrate, Ginger Juice, Lemon Juice, Rose Extract, Rosemary Extract, Natural Elderflower Flavor.

name: Filthy Gold Rush
description:

INGREDIENTS: Filtered Water, Lemon Juice, American Honey.

name: Filthy Olive Brine
description:
A perfect brine for a filthy martini! Filthy naturally cures olives to create a wonderfully rich, woody, and nutty olive brine. The brine is filtered multiple times and is proudly served by some of the best bars in the world. Each pouch makes about 15 martinis.

Ingredients: Filtered Water, Olive Juice, Salt, Lactic Acid (Preservative), Ascorbic Acid, Vinegar, Sodium Benzoate (Preservative), Vermouth

name: Filthy Spicy Agave Nectar
description:
A delicious organic ready to go cocktail mixer! This spicy agave nectar is made with 100% organic blue weber agave, which is the only agave variety approved to make tequila. The agave heart is warmed, not burned, and slow pressed to release the golden nectar. No artificial sweeteners, colors, flavors or preservatives. Each pouch makes about 32 cocktails and has notes of spicy jalapeño & tropical citrus.

Ingredients: Organic Agave Nectar, Filtered Water, Natural Jalapeño and Citrus Extracts, Citric Acid.

name: Flora Passionfruit Margarita
description:
Product Details:
Flora Passion Fruit Margarita is a tropical twist on the classic cocktail, combining the tangy sweetness of passion fruit with the zesty kick of a traditional margarita.

This flavorful beverage features a blend of premium tequila, triple sec, fresh lime juice, and passion fruit puree, creating a refreshing and vibrant flavor profile.

Served over ice and garnished with a slice of lime or a wedge of fresh passion fruit, Flora Passion Fruit Margarita offers a refreshing and exotic drink experience perfect for enjoying on a sunny day or at any festive occasion.

name: Flower Infused Cocktail Book
description:
Dive into the delightful universe of mixology with the Season and Stir™ Flower-Infused Cocktail: Flowers, with a Twist! This inspiring cocktail book helps you turn ordinary drinks into extraordinary flower-infused cocktails. Perfect for anyone eager to add an elegant and aromatic touch to their gatherings.

This book is more than just a collection of recipes; it is an exploration of flavors and floral folklore. With over 60 unique recipes featuring edible flowers, you will create vibrant libations that are not only tasty but aesthetically pleasing. Each cocktail tells a story, enriching your mixology journey with the essence of nature's beauty.

Whether you're a novice or an experienced mixologist, the Flower-Infused Cocktail book is essential for your collection. Uncover the magical ways to incorporate floral elements into your beverages. You’ll find:

  • Inspiration from 63 cocktail and mocktail recipes featuring various edible flowers, designed to impress your guests.
  • Insights into the rich history, folklore, and practical advice on using these flowers to enhance your drinks, making each sip memorable.

Beyond traditional cocktails, discover how to craft Base Spirit Infusions, Cordials, Shrubs, Simple Syrups, Infused Salts, and Bitters. This guide will equip you with essential tips for building your own home bar that features the freshest, edible flowers.

Here are some highlights of the recipes you'll create:

  • Elderflower Liqueur
  • Hawthorn Rose Cordial
  • Lavender-Infused Gin
  • Pansy Sugar Cubes
  • Spiced Calendula Simple Syrup
  • Yarrow Bitters
  • Osmanthus Sweet Vermouth

This hardcover edition boasts 188 pages filled with rich recipes and beautiful photography, making it the ultimate guide to appreciating flowers beyond the vase. Elevate your cocktail experience and astonish your friends and family with captivating floral flavors today!

description:

The Spirit of Bourbon embodies a luxurious, oak-infused, caramel-laden non-alcoholic option (less than 0.5% ABV) akin to esteemed Kentucky Bourbon. Crafted from entirely natural flavors and functional ingredients, it revitalizes your taste buds, uplifts your spirits, and reenergizes your body.

Infused with functional ingredients and vitamins that enhance well-being and mood, it presents a delightful burnt orange hue that uplifts the senses.

The interplay of bitterness and sweetness creates a harmonious and lively palate. Serving as a delectable rendition of a timeless spirit, The Spirit of Milano eliminates the dilemma of choosing between flavor and health benefits.

Sweet cinnamon and clove, rich red fruit sharpness, and sourness from the rhubarb.

Water, sugar, fruit and vegetable juice (for color), natural flavors such as blood orange, rhubarb, cinnamon, and clove, citric acid, potassium sorbate (as preservative), and vitamins B3 and B6

Made using entirely natural flavors and functional ingredients, it serves to invigorate the senses, uplift the spirits, and rejuvenate the body.

With its earthy, spicy aroma and a palate dominated by smoky, agave-rich notes, The Spirit of Tequila sets the stage for lively moments and upbeat conversations. Available in a 750ml bottle. Alcohol-free, gluten-free, vegan, organic, and incredibly delicious

How it Tastes:
Aromatic with earthy and spicy tones, this scent awakens the palate, leading to subtle notes of charred oak and zesty lime. The finish, dominated by smoky, agave-rich flavors, encapsulates the true essence of tequila, culminating in a nuanced golden appearance.

Ingredients:

name: Ghia & Blood Orange
description:
Tasting Notes

Blood Orange brings bold citrus flavor and natural sweetness; a Southern European staple known for its bold color and slightly tart, floral edge.

Rounded by a whisper of marjoram—a Mediterranean herb with a citrusy, pine-like character that adds subtle complexity without overpowering.

This one's a softer take on our signature bitter aperitivo—designed for those who prefer a gentler profile without sacrificing complexity.

How To Enjoy

An Apéritif for any time, anywhere — in your favorite glass with a garnish, in your picnic basket or beach bag, or when you don’t have time to play bartender for your guests.

Made for whenever the mood calls for something a little easier to love at first sip.

Enjoy cold, ideally with friends and really good music.

Ingredients

No alcohol, no added sugars, no artificial flavors.

Water, White Grape Juice Concentrate, Blood Orange Juice Concentrate, Lemon Juice Concentrate, Lemon Balm Extract, Date Concentrate, Gentian Root Extract, Orange Blossom Extract, Plum Juice Concentrate, Blood Orange Extract, Fruit and Vegetable Juice for Color, Marjoram Extract, Acacia, Rhubarb Root Extract, Ginger Extract, Yuzu Extract.

Heady, toasted malt. Peaty, earthy, with hints of bitter-sweet chocolate and lively coffee beans.

The perfect combination of peat smoke, liquorice, black pepper, chocolate and candied peel.

Punchy and intense, with a well-defined, powerful richness.

name: ISH Caribbean Spiced Spirit
description:
Product Details:
Caribbean Spiced Spirit offers a high-quality, alcohol-free rum alternative infused with indulgent flavors of caramel, vanilla, and nutmeg. Crafted with natural botanicals such as Madagascar vanilla, nutmeg, and baked apple, it delivers a rich array of warm spices without the presence of alcohol.

This non-alcoholic spirit is ideal for creating flavorful mojitos and daiquiris, providing an authentic Caribbean-inspired experience without the need for liquor.

How it Tastes:
Caramel, vanilla, and nutmeg — the familiar, rich, and warming flavors reminiscent of Rum in ISH Caribbean Spiced Spirit. Through "Supercritical CO2 Extraction," the alcohol is removed from full-strength Rum at 73 bars and 30°C, preserving its natural profile. Enriched with vanilla from Madagascar's Sava region, Indonesian nutmeg, and baked apple, it offers a lush, complex flavor akin to classic spiced Rum.

Furthermore, a unique distillate utilizing chili seed shells adds the satisfying heat characteristic of our spirits.

Ingredients:
Water, glycerol, sugar, apple extract, citric acid, cellulose gum, natural flavoring (which includes extracts of vanilla, nutmeg, and capsicum), and potassium sorbate (a preservative).

name: ISH G&T
description:
Product Details:
ISH G&T offers a refreshing twist on the classic gin and tonic, boasting a perfect balance of botanical gin and crisp tonic water, creating a delightful and invigorating taste experience.

How it Tastes:
Our botanicals for ISH G&T come from various parts of Europe, including sun-dried juniper berries and coriander seeds primarily from Provence, France. Together, they create a vibrant citrus symphony that includes bitter orange, lemon, lime, and mandarin.

In addition, we've created a special distillate that uses chili seed shells to give our cocktails the perfect amount of heat.

Ingredients:
Water, Sugar, Carbon Dioxide, Glycerol, Citric acid, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Quinine, and Natural Flavoring (including juniper, capsicum, coriander, lemon, lime, mandarin, bitter orange, and orange extract).

name: ISH Lime Daiquiri
description:
ISH Lime Daiquiri is a multi award-winning non-alcoholic Daiquiri. Based on our ISH Caribbean Spiced Spirit, lime and sugar, we strive to deliver the most authentic non-alcoholic Daiquiri experience for the mindful drinker.

We wish to honor the original Daiquiri, a timeless classic cocktail that dates back to 1898 in the eponymous mining town of Daiquiri on the southeastern tip of Cuba. The taste of dark Rum is balanced with the sour limes, mainly sourced from Mexico and raw sugar. Simple, delicious and alcohol-free. Additionally they have developed a unique distillate using the shells from chili seeds to provide the satisfying heat we love from our cocktails.

ISH Lime Daiquiri can be enjoyed straight from the chilled can or dressed up in a coupe glass with a fresh lime wheel. Want to add a slight buzz? Simply spike your ISH Lime Daiquiri with a dash of dark Rum. The result is a mindful cocktail significantly lower in alcohol, compared to your traditional Daiquiri. The Daiquiri is typically a short drink, so each can contains two servings, perfect for sharing with a friend.

name: Jean Dubost Corkscrew Bottle Opener Set
description:
A great gift, this corkscrew and bottle opener set will never let you down. Whether you're serving beer or wine, you're all set and will never have to worry if you will be able to uncork that wine. The corkscrew and bottle opener are both made from high-grade stainless steel and the handles are acrylic. Each item in this set goes through 25 different production stages before it is stamped, polished, and packaged.

Care Instructions: We recommend washing your cutlery gently by hand under running hot water and to wipe it off immediately after. However, most of products, apart from those with natural wood handles, are dish-washer safe.

It is important to comply with the following instructions:

  • Avoid long washing cycles
  • Open the dish-washer as soon as the cycle is finished
  • Do not leave the knives in the dish-washer for several hours after washing cycle
  • When you take them out of the dishwasher and before putting them away, dry with a soft cloth

The Laguiole knife has been used in the south of France for over 200 years. Jean Dubost's family, inspired by the traditional peasant tool, has been crafting the artisan blades since 1920. Surrounded by legend and myth, the Laguiole knife still carries the mark of its ancestors. A bee that is found engraved on all Laguiole products, was originally part of Napoleon Bonaparte's imperial seal. The blade, made of high-grade stainless steel, is stamped, then ground and then polished in over 25 different manual production stages. Recently, the Laguiole mark has expanded to include flatware, wine waiters and cutlery crafted with the same quality and craftsmanship. Trusted and revered in kitchens and restaurants through-out France, the Dubost family is happy for the Laguiole tradition to finally reach this side of the Atlantic.

We understand the desire for the taste and experience of wine, even without the alcohol. It's more than just a beverage—it's an entire sensory experience, from the elegant bottle to the satisfying pop of the cork and the effervescent bubbles dancing on your palate.

With our Sparkling Non-Alcoholic Wine, you can indulge guilt-free in all the celebration and enjoyment you love about wine. It's delicious, fun, and perfect for any festive occasion. Plus, it's low in sugar and crafted to taste just like the real thing, minus the alcohol.

How it Tastes:
These flavors dance deliciously on your palate, with notes of crisp green apple, aromatic fall pear, and ripe melon at the end.

Ingredients:
White grape juice concentrate, de-stilled wine, water, natural flavors, sulfur dioxide and carbon dioxide (to maintain quality). Has Sulfites in It.

name: KA! Kanna Chews
description:
An unexpectedly delicious handcrafted Chew made with 100% botanicals like Kanna, a psychoactive (not psychedelic) plant from South Africa. Kanna has been clinically proven to activate an immediate sense of grounded energy, helping people feel more alive, connected and capable as they navigate everyday stress*. The effect is subtle, and does not impact sobriety. With KA!’s patent-pending formulation, you get the best Kanna supplements to support your mental, physical and emotional wellbeing.

Each pack contains 10 pieces (servings) of Kanna Chews. Each Chew contains 30mg of standardized, high potency Kanna extract.

KA! makes everything a little more enjoyable: Try our Kanna Chews at the top of your day for an energizing dose of goodness, before you give the best Ted Talk of your life or instead of a cocktail before a lively night out with friends.

Do not use Kanna or KA! products in conjunction with Monoamine Oxidase Inhibitors (MAOIs), Selective Serotonin Reuptake Inhibitors (SSRIs), Serotonin-Norepinephrine Reuptake inhibitors (SNRIs), Norepinephrine and Dopamine Reuptake Inhibitors (NDRI's), Benzodiazepines or Central Nervous System (CNS) depressants without medical supervision by a qualified healthcare professional.

name: KA! Kanna Tincture
description:
Expand your consciousness with KA!’s new omnipotent, heart-opening Kanna Tincture.

This alcohol-free sublingual Kanna supplement has a quick-onset, allowing you to easily adjust your dose for immediate and long-term benefits. The perfect combination with transporting sandalwood, antimicrobial Acmella, liver-loving Milk Thistle and neuroprotective Ginger come together to form the best Kanna extract on the market. The super plants in this formulation help improve organ function and support the immune and nervous systems, while optimizing mental and emotional well-being.

Ka’s team of scientists designed this delicious empathogenic Tincture to maximize the bioavailability of healing phytochemicals more than any other Kanna Tincture out there.

The recommended dose of 20 drops (1 full dropperful) = 30mg of Kanna, though you can always microdose with less. If you want to start slow, go for 5 drops—you can always take more. Each bottle contains 1g of Kanna, which is approximately 30 doses or a one-month daily supply. Experience the best effects with regular use.

description:
Product Details:

How it Tastes:
Strong, rich, and earthy. Chocolate and cherry flavors come together to create a well-balanced, alluring wine substitute.

description:
Product Details:

Lively and herbaceous, Orchard Sage presents a magical wine alternative with hints of mint, lemon, and apple. Sage lends complex mint and lemon notes, blending seamlessly with apple and elderflower for a delightful palate experience. With its light, tangy profile, Orchard Sage offers a seductive, lingering finish.

Ingredients:
Filtered Water, Chardonnay Verjus, Apple Juice, Elderflower Extract, Decaffeinated Green Tea Extract, and Sage Extract from Organic Sources..

name: Kolonne Null Cuvée Rouge No.2
description:
A full-bodied bouquet, powerful and youthful at the same time. Underlined by pepper notes, dark fruits, and berry flavors carry us back to the heart of Spain, to the sunny plateau of La Meseta. Kolonne Null'sCuvée Rouge No.2 is a perfect companion for grilled specialties, risotto or pasta variations.

  • Grape variety: Cuvée

  • Suggested serving temperature: 59 - 65 °F / 15 - 18 °C

name: Kolonne Null Cuvée Rouge No.3
description:
An enticing blend of Merlot and Cabernet, partially aged in oak barrels. This alcohol-free wine from Bordeaux presents an intense freshness and a complex interplay of red fruits, spices, and subtle hints of oak. The deep dark red color of the Cuvée promises smooth fullness. Kolonne Null's Cuvée Rouge No.3 is a perfect companion for red meat, root vegetables, and risotto.

  • Grape variety: Merlot, Cabernet

  • Suggested serving temperature: 59 - 65 °F / 15 - 18 °C

name: Kolonne Null Riesling
description: The Riesling 2024 vintage is particularly distinguished by freshness, the aromas of yellow fruits and an invigorating, elegant minerality. Aging on fine lees and temperature-controlled fermentation in stainless steel tanks give it a refreshing and harmonious flavor profile. This exquisite wine has an aroma of yellow fruits with fresh and elegant minerality. This versatile wine is a true all-rounder - it pairs perfectly with fish, seafood, or white meat. SALUTE!

name: Kolonne Null Rosé
description:
ROSÉ vintage 2024.

Elegant and fresh – from the South of France, with delicate aromas of red berries and vineyard peach.
Shaped by the limestone-rich terroir of Provence, flint notes, and the Mediterranean climate, this vintage was developed under the careful guidance of our cellar master in collaboration with our long-standing partner winery. The fine bouquet is the result of extended lees aging, late harvest, and the cooling Mistral winds.

Grape variety: Grenache, Syrah, Cinsault.

Suggested serving temperature: 6 - 8 °C / 42.8 - 46.4°F

name: Kolonne Null Sparkling Cuvée Blanc 375ml
description:
The Cuvée Blanc No.1 Sparkling Edition Freiherr von Gleichenstein offers a harmonious combination of yellow fruit of pear and mirabelle, rounded off with a touch of typical brioche notes. The elegant acidity is balanced by a creamy, fine bubbly texture. Excellent as an aperitif or as a companion to fine canapés, seafood, fresh desserts such as zabaglione and panna cotta with fruit.

  • Grape variety: Cuvée
  • Suggested serving temperature: 6 - 8 °C / 42.8 - 46.4°F
  • Non-Alcoholic - Vegan - Low Calorie - Gluten free

name: Kolonne Null Sparkling Rose 250ml
description:
With 0.0% alcohol and under the motto "La vie en Dose," our favorite sparkling drink, Sparkling Rosé, is making its debut in a stylish 0.2l can. Inspired by the iconic song "La vie en rose," we’re floating on pink clouds. We’re in love with our new crush, the sparkling Rosé.

Syrah and Grenache have come together to form a delicate French sparkling wine. Its balanced acidity perfectly complements the lightly playful sweetness of red berries. The refreshing effervescence and exquisite bubbles provide an outstanding mouthfeel.

Whether strolling in the park or during your escapades in the dark, our sparkling drink is the ideal companion. The sparkling drink comes in a convenient 4-pack – perfect for sharing!

name: Kolonne Null Verdejo
description: The Verdejo 2023 impresses with its fruity-tropical bouquet, delivering a particularly lively and light experience. This wonderful explosion of flavors is harmoniously rounded off by delicate herbal nuances, creating an exciting contrast to the balanced sweetness of the fruits. This versatile Verdejo is a true all-rounder - it pairs perfectly with fish, seafood, or white meat. SALUTE!

name: Konsoom Power & Recovery
description:
Konsoom was created with a simple idea: functional performance should taste as good as it feels. Power & Recovery blends 3g of clinically backed CreaBev® creatine with 349mg of essential BCAAs, helping to fuel strength, endurance, and recovery—whether you’re training hard or pushing through a long day.

Naturally sweetened with 30% fruit juice, including blueberry, blackberry, and white grape, every can delivers a crisp, refreshing flavor without added sugar, artificial sweeteners, or preservatives. Non-GMO and crafted with clean ingredients, it’s a modern take on sports nutrition—designed to support both body and mind.

Konsoom is more than just a beverage; it’s a culture of functional consumption. Beginning with creatine, we’re rethinking how performance drinks can empower everyday movement.

description: Show a little love to your insides with this revitalizing cup of tea your gut will thank you for. name: Lake & Oak Matcha Bowl
description:
Traditional Japanese Ceramic Matcha Bowl

Whisk & sip your matcha with bliss!

Enjoy a smooth, perfectly whisked cup of matcha the traditional way with this beautiful ceramic bowl. 

Japanese matcha ceremony is all about moving slow, and appreciating the little moments -- starting with your mindful morning cup of tea. Whisk, sip & savour the matcha boost. You deserve it. 

HOW TO:

In your matcha bowl, add Lake & Oak Purely Matcha or Mega Matcha powder and a splash of hot (not boiling) water. 

Top with hot milk to make a matcha latte. Matcha can be enjoyed right from the bowl, or poured into your fave mug. Sip and bliss out! 

Care instructions 

Dishwasher friendly.

name: Lake & Oak Turmeric Ginger Tea Blend
description:
Sip and bliss out on this fiery concoction of glowing Turmeric Root, zingy Ginger and Tulsi. It’s an invigorating, soul-soothing, warrior in a cup.

Lake & Oak Tea Co. is 100% organic and filled with adaptogens. This tea is perfect for a soothing all day caffeine-free sip, to soothe your stomach between meals, to calm your nerves, to boost immunity and reduce inflammation with superfoods, or as a sugar-free treat before bed.

name: Lapo's Citrus Spritz (4-Pack)
description:
The ultimate non-alcoholic Citrus Spritz, with real citrus, herbs, and all-natural ingredients - like a sunny day in a can.

Lapo's Citrus Spritz is an ode to the citrus groves of coastal Italy. This cocktail is a medley of lemon, lime and orange, with notes of juniper and thyme. Pleasant spicy and bitter notes round out the experience. drink chilled from the can or serve over ice and garnish with an orange slice.

description:
Lapo’s Non Alcoholic Aperitivo was born in Florence, Italy’s most famous bar, where a smiling barman in a tuxedo–Lapo–serves the best negroni in town.

The magic of Lapo’s is a simple yet bold palate. A citrus-centered, bittersweet balance of Italian orange and gentian root are grounded in hibiscus, juniper, rhubarb root, and dandelion root.

Inspired by the traditions of Firenze, this aperitivo contains the spirit of lively summer nights and long, leisurely meals.

In other words—it's for really, truly enjoying.

To Serve
Simply substitute Lapos where Campari is called for. As Lapo would have it, serve in a simple spritz at lunchtime or golden hour. Later on, try your hand at a non-alcoholic Negroni or Americano. As always, garnish with an orange wedge & cin cin.

name: Lapos Espresso Martini
description: This delicious ready to drink cocktail from Lapo's has a rich coffee flavor with a velvety texture. You’ll also get notes of vanilla and cinnamon with 120 mg of caffeine, it’s perfect for a pre-dinner cocktail, fuel for a big night out on the town, or a mid-party pick-me-up –  the night is young!

name: Lapos Espresso Martini
description: This delicious ready to drink cocktail from Lapo's has a rich coffee flavor with a velvety texture. name: Lapos Negroni
description:
Lapo’s Non Alcoholic Negroni was born in Florence, Italy’s most famous bar, where a smiling barman in a tuxedo – Lapo – serves the best negroni in town. This cocktail is perfectly bittersweet, with notes of juniper and bright citrus. It’s also lightly sparkling and “molto bitter.”

You can drink chilled from the can or serve over ice and garnish with an orange slice – the way Lapo likes it.

name: Lapos Negroni
description:
Lapo’s Non Alcoholic Negroni was born in Florence, Italy’s most famous bar, where a smiling barman in a tuxedo – Lapo – serves the best negroni in town. This cocktail is perfectly bittersweet, with notes of juniper and bright citrus. It’s also lightly sparkling and “molto bitter.”
