name: Lautus Chardonnay
description: Pour a summer fruit salad from this bottle of South African non-alcoholic white wine. Pineapple, passion fruit, white peach, and ripe melon, spritzed with a squeeze of lime. And of course, the characteristic Savvy B tingle of fresh, green bell pepper tickles the nose on the lingering finish.

name: Lautus Rose
description:
Pinotage grapes for this Rosé wine from Voor-Paardeberg, a small wine-growing area close to Paarl in the Western Cape region of South Africa. 

Pure aromas of red berry fruit with floral notes. The palate shows a touch of sweetness, but with well-balanced acidity.

  • 23cal per 5oz serving
  • 32g/100ml residual sugar per litre
  • Non Alcoholic, Vegan Friendly, Low in Calories

name: Lautus Savvy Red
description:
The grapes for our red blend, Lautus Savvy Red, are sourced from our winemaker's family farm in Vredendal, located in the northern Olifants River Valley of the Western Cape province in South Africa. With meticulous care, we delicately remove the alcohol from this rich and supple red blend. Our blend follows the order in which Reg planted the hectares on their farm: Shiraz, Pinotage, Tempranillo, and Cabernet Sauvignon.

This combination showcases the pure flavors of red and black berries, complemented by a subtle touch of oak. The elegant palate is supported by fine tannins and juicy yet delicate fruit notes. Lautus Savvy Red is meant to be enjoyed in its purest and most natural form, free from the constraints of alcohol.

How it Tastes: In the glass, dark red. Red fruit, blackberry, and a hint of wood all present in this medium-bodied wine, which is supported by smooth tannins and a pleasant, dry finish.

Ingredients: De-alcoholized wine produced with glycerol, grape sugars, sulfites, and Shiraz, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Pinotage.

name: Lautus Sparkling Rosé
description:
Product Details:
This Rosé wine packs a punch with pure aromas of sweet redberry fruit and floral notes on the nose. The elegant palate shows a touch of sweetness, finishing fresh with a well-balanced acidity.

How it Tastes:
The nose is alive with strawberries and raspberries with a hint of floral notes, which the bubbles accentuate. The palate shows slight sweetness, with a lively, but elegant sparkle.

Ingredients:
De-alcholize sparkling rosé, grape sugars, sulfur dioxide, glycerol

name: Le Naturel Zero Zero Red Wine
description:
Product Details:
Zero Zero Wineoffers all the sensations and pleasures of a fine glass of wine, without the alcohol. Crafted through a meticulous process, our dealcoholized wine begins with traditional winemaking methods.

For Le Naturel, this involves an artisanal approach with minimal intervention philosophy. After the wine is produced, the alcohol is gently removed, preserving the wine's aromas and flavors.

How it Tastes:
Berries with a hint of spice provide joy and freshness.

Ingredients:
Made with White Garnacha and Viura.

name: Le Naturel Zero Zero White
description:
Product Details:
Le Naturel Zero Zero alcohol-free wines empower you to embrace your authentic self. With the full-bodied flavor, enticing aroma, and satisfying texture reminiscent of premium wines, it caters to athletes, mothers, and individuals pursuing a healthier lifestyle, offering a guilt-free indulgence without any alcohol content.

How it Tastes:
Very nice, with hints of sweetness and a welcome kick of acidity.

Ingredients:
Viura and Garnacha Blanca grapes.

name: Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Pinot Noir
description:
Product Details:
The latest addition, ZERO-POINT-FIVE Non-alcoholic Pinot Noir, presents an enticingly clean and fresh vinous character. Its fruity essence boasts hints of red currants and cherries, accompanied by a well-integrated tannin framework and a nearly dry finish.

While it's understood that an alcohol-free wine may not possess the same complexity, structure, and mouthfeel as its alcoholic counterpart, the ZP5 comes remarkably close and impresses with its taste!

This wine pairs excellently with roasts or game and serves as a delightful option alongside grilled fish or lamb biryani. For optimal enjoyment, serve the newest addition slightly chilled in a generous glass.

How it Tastes:
The Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Pinot Noir offers a clean, fresh taste with fruity notes of red currants and cherries. Its integrated tannin structure and nearly dry finish provide a satisfying experience. While it may not match traditional wine's depth, it comes close and impresses with its flavor.

Enjoy it chilled with roasts, game, grilled fish, or lamb biryani.

Ingredients:
Contains sulphites; alcohol-free wine.

name: Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Riesling Bottle
description:
Product Details:
The Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Riesling is a non-alcoholic wine that provides a refreshing taste experience. With its vibrant acidity and fruity flavors, it offers notes of crisp apple, zesty citrus, and hints of tropical fruits. This alcohol-free option is perfect for those seeking a flavorful beverage to enjoy on any occasion.

How it Tastes:
The Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Riesling presents a crisp and vibrant taste profile. It features refreshing notes of green apple, tangy citrus, and subtle hints of tropical fruits. With a lively acidity, this non-alcoholic wine offers a delightful drinking experience, perfect for any occasion.

Ingredients:
Dealcoholized wine, rectified concentrate grape must, grape must, and sucrose.

name: Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Sparkling Riesling 250ml
description:
Product Details:
Indulge in the invigorating flavor of Leitz Eins-Zwei Rosé, a delightful non-alcoholic wine in a can ideal for summertime enjoyment. Featuring a prominent strawberry scent accompanied by delicate notes of rosehip and raspberries, this subtly fruity drink entices the palate.

Its vibrant acidity adds a refreshing touch, enriching the wine's overall crispness and succulence. Uncover a true culinary delight with this alcohol-free Rosé, crafted to enhance your summer experiences.

How it Tastes:
This sparkling Riesling offers a refreshing medley of fruity tastes, featuring distinct hints of crisp apple, tangy citrus, and subtle tropical fruit undertones such as pineapple. The bubbles provide a lively sensation, enriching the overall enjoyment.

Whether you're celebrating or simply unwinding, this alcohol-free sparkling Riesling is an ideal choice for anyone in search of a vibrant and flavorful drink.

Ingredients:
Dealcoholized wine, grape must, sulfites, and dimethyl carbonate.

name: Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Sparkling Rose Bottle
description:
Product Details:
Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Sparkling Rosé is a non-alcoholic sparkling wine crafted by Weingut Leitz, esteemed for its commitment to quality winemaking.

This Sparkling Rosé originates from Germany's Pfalz region, renowned for its ideal climate and terroir for producing exceptional wines. Made with a blend of carefully selected grapes, this alcohol-free sparkling wine undergoes a meticulous fermentation process to preserve its natural flavors and characteristics.

With its lively effervescence and refreshing taste profile, it offers delightful notes of strawberries, raspberries, and hints of floral aromas. Perfect for any occasion, this Sparkling Rosé provides a sophisticated and enjoyable alternative to traditional sparkling wines.

How it Tastes:
The Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Sparkling Rosé offers a delightful and refreshing taste experience. With its lively effervescence, it presents vibrant notes of strawberries, raspberries, and subtle floral hints.

This non-alcoholic sparkling wine provides a sophisticated and enjoyable alternative to traditional rosé wines, making it perfect for any occasion.

Ingredients:
Wine with eliminated alcohol and sulfite content.

name: Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Sparkling Rosé 250ml
description:
Product Details:
Experience the exquisite taste of Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Sparkling Rosé, a remarkable alcohol-free wine that captivates with its clean, fresh flavors. This 250ml can showcase delicate notes of pale strawberries, raspberry, and citrus, complemented by subtle hints of fresh grapefruit and a foundation of natural minerals. With a satisfyingly dry and remarkably long finish, this alcohol-free wine delivers a truly unique and refreshing drinking experience.

Vegan Friendly, Gluten-Free

How it Tastes:
Leitz Eins Zwei Zero Sparkling Rosé delights with its refreshing blend of cool, red fruits and lean minerality, offering a crisp and invigorating experience reminiscent of traditional rosé wines.

Ingredients:
Dealcoholised wine, grape must, dimethyl dicarbonate, sulfites

name: Les Marees Blanc de Blanc
description: Les Marées is no ordinary sparkling wine; it’s a delicious, crisp ride through the wilds of the French countryside. Bottled with elegance and purity, it shows bright acidity and delicate fruit flavors. It’s fantastic on its own or transforms a spritz or cocktail into something transcendent. Born from organically farmed grapes, Les Marées is a nod to a region as complex and untamed as its soil - a mosaic of place, finesse, freshness, and raw, unapologetic harmony. This isn’t just wine; it’s a revolution in a glass.

name: Let's Get Baked High Times Cannabis Book
description:
Bake and learn how to get baked with Let's Get Baked! High Times: The Official Cannabis Cookbook! Create delicious CBD and THC-infused treats with this easy-to-follow cookbook that is sure to satisfy your cravings. Featuring more than 60 recipes inspired by High Times Magazine, this cookbook takes readers on an edible journey to bliss and relaxation. This cookbook book also includes plenty of tips and tricks for non-infused recipes that every home chef can use if they are searching for a sugar high. With beautiful full-color photography, Let's Get Baked! High Times: The Official Cannabis Cookbook is a must-have for everyone, for those who like to partake.

60+ RECIPES: Enjoy more than 60 recipes for infused and non-infused recipes that are sure to feed your munchies

BAKING MADE EASY: High or not, home cooks of all skill levels can create high-quality food with these easy-to-follow instructions and simple techniques

INSPIRING IMAGES: Beautiful photos offer inspiration and ideas for serving at your next pothead potluck or late-night munchie session

INCLUSIVE RECIPES: Also includes a helpful nutrition guide and suggestions for alternate ingredients, so those with dietary restrictions can also enjoy

DECORATING TIPS: Includes decorating tips to create works of art that will make you second guess your munchies

name: Leune Piña Dream Gem Drops
description:
Fresh juicy pineapple notes balanced by a hint of heat. The vibe is intended to transcend you from the noise of everyday life to a tranquil and serene state. With a 2:2:1 THC:CBD:CBG ratio, these Pineapple Jalapeño gemmies offer a unique and well-rounded edible experience.

Certificate of Analysis

Indulge in the refreshing essence of a pristine forest breeze with our Little Saint Ginger Mule, guaranteed to bring a smile to your face and help you naturally unwind.

Featuring the aromatic flavors of ginger beer, lime, and a subtle touch of lavender, this beverage offers a visually captivating experience. Plus, it's sugar-free, with just 5 calories per can, and enriched with 100mg of organic Reishi extract for an added boost.

Enjoy it over ice in a rocks glass for the ultimate sensory delight.

How it Tastes:
Experience the delightful flavors of ginger beer, lime, and a subtle touch of lavender in our Ginger Mule, complemented by its visually captivating appearance. Our sugar-free, non-alcoholic Little Saints Paloma has garnered a cult following, described as "incredibly unique," "exceptional," and "a must-have nightly drink." With sensory notes of grapefruit, citrus rinds, and a subtle hint of agave, it boasts a visually pleasing pink hue derived from vegetables.

With zero sugar and only 5 calories per can, it's also enhanced with 100mg of organic Reishi extract. Enjoy it over ice in your preferred glass, or straight from the chilled can for the ultimate experience. Enjoy it over ice in a rocks glass for the ultimate sensory delight.

Are you fond of the way a tangy, slightly salty taste tingles your taste buds and creates a relaxed sensation? If so, and you're seeking a non-alcoholic option that provides a similar experience, then the Paloma mocktail might be just what you're looking for.

Enhanced with a mood-boosting mix of Reishi mushroom and aromatic terpenes, our non-alcoholic version offers that uplifting, "take the edge off" sensation you crave from a cocktail, minus the alcohol content.

The Spicy Margarita by Little Saints boasts a tantalizing blend of flavors. With a fiery kick and a hint of tanginess, it's a perfect balance of heat and zest. Every sip tantalizes the taste buds, offering a refreshing and invigorating experience.

description:
Product Details:
St. Ember, named after the "elixir of the gods," little saints paloma draws with its complex flavor profile, smoky overtones, and ritualistic applications.

With a refined, unique flavor profile of ginger, cardamom, vanilla, and palo santo—a startling combination of wood and fennel—St. Ember dazzles with a peppery kick that penetrates even your favorite cocktails.

How it Tastes:
With a refined, unique flavor profile of ginger, cardamom, vanilla, and palo santo—a startling combination of wood and fennel—St. Ember dazzles with a peppery punch that penetrates all your favorite cocktails.

Ingredients:
Water, Natural Flavors, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate (less than 0.1%), Acacia Tree Extract, Palo Santo Extract, Ginger Extract, Cardamom Extract, Organic Lion's Mane Mushroom Extract (produced in California), Monk Fruit Extract.

name: Little Saints St. Ember - Flask
description:
An ode to the flavors of a light, spicy Mezcal, reimagined without the alcohol. St. Ember features Palo Santo, intertwined with ginger and cardamom to create a fragrant, golden-hour spirit with the warmth and spice to stand alone or serve as the base for a NA margarita or paloma. Enhanced with organic Lion’s Mane for clarity and elevated presence. 

Each drop of Palo Santo extract begins with fallen wood, harvested sustainably from Peru’s Manga Manga forest. 1% of the proceeds from every bottle of St. Ember supports the reforestation efforts of the same Peruvian forests that give St. Ember its soul.

Listed Among Wine & Spirits Magazine's Top 25 Non-Alcoholic Spirits

name: Little Saints St. Juniper
description:
Product Details:

Herbaceous juniper meets a woodsy, citrusy blend of cucumber, birch and yuzu for an experience that’s equal parts bright and complex. Enlivened with organic lion’s mane mushroom and damiana to open hearts and brighten minds.

From martinis to gimlets, St. Juniper can stand alone or be mixed as an alternative to gin in cocktail classics.

name: Little Saints St. Oak
description:
Crafted for those who cherish the deep, comforting warmth of darker liquors, this non-alcoholic spirit honors the character of both rye and bourbon and the soul of an oak-aged whiskey. Using carefully selected American and French oak extracts, St. Oak is infused with the smoky, woody aroma and flavor that mark the soul of an oak-aged whiskey, combined with notes of vanilla, caramel, and spice. 

Enhanced with a trifecta of functional ingredients—Lion's Mane, Reishi for calm, for clarity, and Damiana for ease—this spirit softens your edges without dulling your shine.

description:

Using carefully selected American and French oak extracts, St. Oak is infused with the smoky, woody aroma and flavor that mark the soul of an oak-aged whiskey, combined with notes of vanilla, caramel, and spice. 

Enhanced with a trifecta of functional ingredients—Lion's Mane, Reishi for calm, for clarity, and Damiana for ease—this spirit softens your edges without dulling your shine.

Awarded Best NA Spirit of 2025 by BevNET Spirit Awards.

description:
Nutrient-dense functional mushroom honey to help you regulate your mood, stay focused, and deliver overall well-being goodness. No more gritty residue or strong off-putting taste. Just smooth, sweet deliciousness.

Inspired by chefs' kitchens, our squeeze bottle is a breeze to use and virtually mess-free.

For a dose of daily magic, squeeze in your coffee before your morning meeting, on a charcuterie board, or in a craft drink for a quick boost of immunity and sharpened focus.

LOKI New Dew is a distinctly elevated combination of lemon-lime with hints of orange notes. The vibe stays buoyant and collaborative, like a great road trip where every exit sign is interesting - A uniquely refreshing experience infused with premium cannabis extracts, the lightly carbonated LOKI seltzers offer a sophisticated blend of citrus flavors that delight the senses anywhere, anytime.

You wrap the night feeling energized yet settled, and you wake up ready to keep exploring, no hangover in sight. That is the untamed spark bottled inside.

Each sip smooths the edges of the day, then nudges your imagination towards ocean air and half-finished ideas that suddenly find their endings.

Infused with premium cannabis extracts, LOKI seltzers offer a sophisticated blend of flavors that delights the senses anywhere, anytime.

You wake up the next morning clear headed, no hangover and no regrets. That is exactly where this flavor will take you.

name: Luminara Cabernet Sauvignon
description:
Luminara Alcohol-Removed Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon 2023

Illuminating the idea of what fine wine can be, Luminara is the first-ever exquisitely crafted, alcohol-removed wine made from fruit grown in the prized Napa Valley appellation. By selecting grapes of exceptional quality, in tandem with the most advanced proprietary de-alcoholization technology in the world, Luminara delivers a true fine wine experience—without the alcohol. 

A classic, elegant alcohol-removed Cabernet Sauvignon from the prized Napa Valley. Rich fruit flavors with balanced tannins and structure.

name: Luminara Chardonnay
description:
Luminara Alcohol-Removed Napa Valley Chardonnay 2024

Illuminating the idea of what fine wine can be, Luminara is the first-ever exquisitely crafted, alcohol-removed wine made from fruit grown in the prized Napa Valley appellation. By selecting grapes of exceptional quality, in tandem with the most advanced proprietary de-alcoholization technology in the world, Luminara delivers a true fine wine experience—without the alcohol. 

Our lively alcohol-removed Chardonnay reflects its premium Napa Valley terroir with rich tropical fruit aromas, followed by a palate of Fuji apple and lemon cream. The finish brings a refreshing crispness. This wine shows a lively medium-weighted palate with vibrant varietal fruit characteristics, making our Chardonnay a luminous offering for any occasion.

name: Lyre's Agave Blanco
description:
Product Details:
With flavors that are distinct and rich: lyre agave blanco is a unique spirit
that has been impeccably produced to capture the essence of a Blanco Tequila.

How it Tastes:
With notes of citrus and toasted agave giving way to a delightfully peppery
finish, this rich and full-bodied wine exudes character.

name: MadPop BlackBerry Bliss
description:
Picture this: You crack open the can, and BAM! First, you get hit with that bold, in-your-face blackberry. It’s juicy, it’s loud! Then, just when you think you’ve got it figured out, a zesty lemon zips in, sharp and electric, like a lightning bolt across the sky, waking up your taste buds with a jolt of citrus energy.

But wait—there’s more! Out of nowhere, a cool breeze of lavender floats by, like one of those trippy, surreal clouds in the background of a vibrant street scene. It’s calming, but still a little wild, with a hint of mystery that keeps you guessing. And then, boom! A touch of pink Himalayan salt drops in, like the edgy, unexpected detail in a piece of street art, pulling all the flavors together in perfect, salty harmony. The cane sugar? That’s the finishing stroke, the candy-colored vibe that sweetens the deal, making this drink a bright, bubbly explosion of flavor that’s as bold and unforgettable as a giant, grinning character on a city wall.

name: MadPop Watermelon Haze
description:
All right, here we go: You crack open the can, and it’s like stepping into a world where colors are louder, and the vibe is electric. The first sip? That watermelon smacks you right in the face. It’s sweet, it’s fresh, and it’s like summer just showed up to the party with a boombox. Then, out of the chaos, a cool breeze of basil rolls in—smooth, green, and chill, like the mellow character in a mural that’s just vibin’ with the scene. 

But hold up! A hint of habanero wants to poke its head into the party. It’s got just the right amount of kick to make you sit up and pay attention. And then, bam! A sprinkle of pink salt lands like the final touch of texture, grounding all that wild flavor with a salty snap. The cane sugar ties it all together, sweet and smooth, like the perfect color palette that makes the whole piece pop. This drink is a vibrant explosion of flavors, a little wild, a little sweet, and totally unforgettable—just like a piece of Greg Mike art that you can taste.

name: Magic Cactus: Lavender Raspberry
description:
Every can possesses a base of real sparkling cactus water sourced from the highest quality prickly pear cactus in the Southwest United States & Mexico. Magic Cactus THC non-alcoholic drinks boast immediate notes of red raspberry followed by light lavender for a smooth mouthfeel (even though we hate that word). 

Magic Cactus drinks are packed with real, functional ingredients. Every can contains l-theanine, a natural adaptogen from green tea, to inspire tranquility for the modern mind, magnesium to regulate the brain & body, and potassium to replenish.

All with zero added sugar, Magic Cactus emphasizes quality without calories to provide a healthier, sophisticated beverage option for adults seeking a mindful alternative to alcohol. Magic Cactus is a wildcrafted combination of ancient remedies that drinks like a modern elixir - a unique consumption experience that honors the tradition of alcohol and revitalizes the body and mind. Cheers to Tomorrow.

description: Treat your cat like royalty with premium organic catnip crafted for ultimate feline bliss. name: Missing Thorn Red Blend
description: On the nose, Missing Thorn's Bordeaux blend is a captivating blend of dark fruits and subtle spice. A complex bouquet of cranberry and pomegranate are layered with notes of tobacco, cedar, and subtle vanilla. On the palate, this wine is full-bodied and structured with ripe tannins. Flavors of blackberry, black cherry, and cassis are complemented by secondary notes of mocha.

name: Mixly Blueberry Lemon Sage Mixer
description:
Product Details:
Mixly's Blueberry Lemon Sage Mixer is a carefully crafted blend featuring the refreshing tang of lemon, the sweetness of ripe blueberries, and the earthy, aromatic essence of sage.

How it Tastes:
Mixly's Blueberry Lemon Sage Mixer offers a delightful combination of flavors. The tanginess of lemon and the sweetness of ripe blueberries create a balanced fruity base, while the addition of sage adds a unique earthy and aromatic note, resulting in a refreshing and sophisticated taste experience.

Ingredients:
Water, sweeteners such cane sugar or agave syrup, lemon juice, blueberry juice or extract, sage infusion or extract, and sometimes citric acid or other acidity regulators for flavor balance.

name: Mixly Cucumber Mint Lime Mixer
description:
Product Details:
Mixly's Cucumber Mint Lime Mixer is a meticulously crafted blend that combines the crisp freshness of cucumber, the invigorating coolness of mint, and the zesty tang of lime.

How it Tastes:
Mixly's Cucumber Mint Lime Mixer offers a refreshing and vibrant taste experience. The crispness of cucumber, combined with the invigorating coolness of mint, creates a revitalizing base.

The addition of zesty lime adds a tangy and citrusy kick, resulting in a balanced and refreshing flavor profile.

Ingredients:
Mixly's Cucumber Mint Lime Mixer typically includes cucumber juice, mint extract, lime juice, natural sweeteners, and water to create its refreshing blend.

description:

name: Noughty Blanc
description:
Product Details:
Noughty Blanc by Thomson and Scott is an exquisitely crafted Still White Wine made from Chardonnay and Chenin grapes sourced from South Africa. Made from 55% Chenin Blanc and 45% Chardonnay grapes sourced from dry-land vineyards in South Africa's Western Cape.

Positioned strategically on south-west facing slopes, these vineyards benefit from cool Atlantic Ocean breezes and the cold Benguela current. The deep, well-drained soils are rich in decomposed granite and clay.

After a 14-day fermentation at 14-15°C, the grapes and juice undergo reductive handling to preserve fruitiness. Aged on lees for 2 months to enhance complexity, the wine is then gently dealcoholized using spun cone technology to retain its unique body, color, and flavor profile.

Hints of yellow apple, lime, and chamomile greet the senses, while flavors of honeysuckle, citrus, and jasmine unfold on the palate. This wine showcases an exquisite harmony between acidity and fruitiness.

Non-alcoholic Chenin Blanc and Chardonnay.

description:

RAFT Demerara Syrup, crafted with a 1:1 ratio of demerara sugar to water, offers rich caramel-like sweetness and molasses undertones, enhancing cocktails, coffee, desserts, and more with its versatile flavor profile.

How it Tastes:
Vibrant orange and fragrant rosemary combine to make a pleasantly simple drink that may be enjoyed with or without alcohol.

Ingredients:
Rosemary, organic cane sugar, organic orange juice, and organic lime juice.

name: Raft Grapefruit Smoked Salt and Chile Syrup
description:
Product Details:
RAFT Grapefruit Smoked Salt and Chile Syrup combines tangy grapefruit juice with smoky salt and dried chiles, creating a uniquely flavorful syrup perfect for cocktails and culinary creations.

How it Tastes:
The taste of RAFT Grapefruit Smoked Salt and Chile Syrup is a harmonious blend of tangy citrus from the grapefruit, subtle smokiness from the salt, and a gentle heat from the chiles, resulting in a complex and intriguing flavor profile that enhances a variety of beverages and dishes.

Ingredients:
Organic Cane Sugar, Organic Lime Juice, Organic Agave, Organic Grapefruit Juice, Habanero Peppers, Guajillo Chiles, and Red Alderwood Smoked Sea Salt.

name: Raft Grenadine Syrup
description:
Product Details:
RAFT Grenadine Syrup boasts a delightful balance of fruity sweetness and subtle tartness, imparting a rich pomegranate flavor that enhances a wide range of beverages and desserts with its vibrant taste and captivating crimson color.

How it Tastes:
Warming notes of fresh cut wood, exotic spices, vanilla, and a trace of smoke.

Ingredients:
Pure pomegranate juice reduced to a syrup, sweetened with organic cane sugar and highlighted with fresh lemon juice.

name: Raft Hibiscus Lavender Syrup
description:
Product Details:
RAFT Hibiscus Lavender Syrup blends floral hibiscus and fragrant lavender for a versatile flavor boost. Perfect for cocktails, mocktails, teas, and desserts.

How it Tastes:
Tart hibiscus flavor with a hint of relaxing fragrant lavender.

Ingredients:
Water, organic lavender flowers, organic hibiscus flowers, and organic cane sugar.

name: Raft Lemon Ginger Syrup
description:
RAFT Lemon Ginger is a classic flavor combo that delights. Mostly lemon with soft notes of ginger, this syrup is extremely versatile and pairs well with Vodka, Gin, Tequila, Rum, Whiskey, and Seltzer.

Always made with real juice, real botanicals, and organic cane sugar. Vegan. May contain naturally-occurring pectin, shake well. Once opened, keep refrigerated. Best used within 2 months after opening.

Ingredients: Organic Cane Sugar, Organic Lemon Juice, Water, Organic Ginger

name: Raft Lime Syrup
description:
Product Details:
RAFT Lime Syrup blends the perfect sweetness with the zesty tang of fresh lime juice, creating a versatile addition to cocktails, mocktails, and desserts.

How it Tastes:
The taste of RAFT Lime Syrup is a delightful balance of sweetness and tanginess, with the refreshing zest of fresh lime juice shining through, adding a vibrant citrus flavor to any beverage or dish it enhances.

Ingredients:
Organic lime juice and organic cane sugar.

name: Raft Pineapple Tamarind Syrup
description:
Product Details:
This tart, sweet syrup pairs best with Whisky, Bourbon or Rum. Try it with hot water or your favorite tea for a tropical twist on a Hot Toddy.

How it Tastes:
Sweet pineapple balanced with tart tamarind for delightfully easy sipping with or without alcohol.

Ingredients:
Organic Cane Sugar, Fresh Pineapple Juice, Fresh Lemon Juice, Tamarind and Canela

name: Raft Simple Syrup
description:
Product Details:
RAFT Simple Syrup is a classic syrup made from a straightforward combination of pure cane sugar and water. It provides a balanced sweetness that enhances cocktails, mocktails, and other beverages without overpowering them.

How it Tastes:
RAFT Simple Syrup offers a clean and balanced sweetness, derived from pure cane sugar and water. It enhances drinks with a subtle sweetness without overshadowing their flavors.

Ingredients:
Pure cane sugar and water.

name: Raft Vanilla Syrup
description:
Product Details:
RAFT vanilla syrup is made by combining equal parts sugar and water, infusing with vanilla beans or extract, and optionally adding a touch of citric acid for a subtly tangy and aromatic sweetener perfect for enhancing beverages and desserts.

How it Tastes:
The taste of RAFT vanilla syrup is rich, sweet, and aromatic, with the distinct flavor of vanilla complemented by a subtle hint of citrus if citric acid is added, making it a delightful addition to beverages and desserts.

Ingredients:
Sugar, water, vanilla beans or extract, and optionally a small amount of citric acid or lemon juice for a touch of acidity.

name: Rainbo - 11:11
description:
A blend of 11 powerful and potent functional mushrooms made to consume every day, like a multivitamin. 11:11 is a dual extract tincture to support a high vibrational body. Mushrooms work in synergy with each other to protect and support the body and mind, supporting your immune system and resilience.* 

Rainbo mushrooms are sustainably cultivated in Canada.

name: Rainbo - Lion's Mane
description:
This Lion’s Mane mushroom tincture is a potent and bioavailable dual extract. Made to be taken every day, this tincture acts as a nootropic -improving mood, memory and focus while also providing support for mild memory issues associated with aging.

Rainbo mushrooms are sustainably cultivated in Canada.

name: Rainbo - Reishi
description:
This Reishi tincture is a potent and bioavailable dual extract that is made to be taken every day.

For millennia, Reishi has been regarded as the “Elixir of Immortality” and Queen of functional mushrooms. Reishi has been shown to be adaptogenic - helping support energy and resistance to stress - and may support sleep, the immune system and liver function.

Rainbo mushrooms are sustainably cultivated in Canada.

name: Rainbo - Turkey Tail
description:
Turkey Tail is the most widely researched functional mushroom, it is gut friendly and most renowned for its deep immunity support. Give your immune system a boost with this while also promoting a healthy balance of bacteria in your gut!

Rainbo mushrooms are sustainably cultivated in Canada.

name: Rainbo Fungki Coffee Packet
description:
With 3000mg of mushrooms per serving — this is the highest dose of any mushroom coffee on the market. Rainbo Fungki Coffee Packets include Lion’s Mane for cognitive clarity and focus, Reishi for calm and balance, plus Ginseng and Himalayan salt for adaptogenic energy and mineral support.

Only Fruiting Bodies, Always

Made with 100% organic fruiting body mushrooms — no mycelium, no fillers, no grains. Just the most potent, bioactive part of the mushroom. Contains 44mg of caffeine from low-acid cold brew coffee — a smooth, steady lift without the jitters, spikes, or crashes of regular coffee. Fungki Coffee is smooth, bold, and balanced. Tastes just like coffee without the bitterness.

name: Red Grain Sack Wine Bag
description: Mudpie

name: Renude Chaga Matcha Single Packet
description:
Literally the perfect Matcha. Drink Renude is taking matcha up a notch by combining 100% ceremonial grade matcha with wild-foraged chaga, cacao, cinnamon and monk fruit sweetener. Loaded with antioxidants, adaptogens, and 4x more L-Theanine than green tea - this is the blend you've been waiting for.

Well balanced, smooth, and slightly nutty matcha flavor with the perfect amount of sweetness. Tastes like matcha ice cream. Other matcha lattes can taste bitter, like grass or seaweed and this one is super smooth and palatable for even someone who doesn't drink matcha. It's a drink both a seasoned matcha drinker and first time matcha drinker will love.

name: Renude Chagaccino Single Packet
description: It’s your coffee’s BFF with benefits! Boost your morning brew with your new fav fully formulated mushroom mocha, and transform your typical coffee into a sugar-free, vegan, keto-friendly latte. Cleaned up and spiked with an effective dose of the planet’s greatest adaptogens to support immunity, promote anti-aging, boost your energy without the jitters, and protect your chill. It’s the health and wellness version of an iced mocha latte (try it hot too tho).

name: Renude Chagaccino Tin
description: It’s your coffee’s BFF with benefits! Boost your morning brew with your new fav fully formulated mushroom mocha, and transform your typical coffee into a sugar-free, vegan, keto-friendly latte. Cleaned up and spiked with an effective dose of the planet’s greatest adaptogens to support immunity, promote anti-aging, boost your energy without the jitters, and protect your chill. It’s the health and wellness version of an iced mocha latte (try it hot too tho).

name: Renude Hot Chocolate Mix - Single Packet
description:
End your day on a soothing note with Reishi Cacao—the clean, upgraded, healthy hot chocolate you’ve been waiting for. Made from Organic Peruvian Cacao, this 45-calorie drink is the perfect "last ☕ before you fast."

Nutrient-rich: Packed with vitamins, minerals and flavonoids to leave you feeling satisfied.

Satisfies Cravings: Swap late-night snacks for this delicious, satisfying treat.

Rest and Relax: Cacao contains more magnesium than any food on the planet allowing you to drop into an evening of chill.

Your New Nightcap: A comforting, indulgent drink to help you relax and ease into a restful night.

name: Ripple Lighter - Cherry Blossom
description: This fun and quirky table lighter makes a cute statement in any room. Its unique ripple design adds a playful touch to your space. The maxi size is a real statement. Use it to light your incense, candles, or anything else that needs a spark.

name: Ritual Aperitif
description:
Product Details:
Cool and revitalizing, vibrant and fragrant, daring yet subtly sweet, Ritual Aperitif Alternative encapsulates the essence of summer.

Combining the assertive bitterness of Italian aperitivo with the intricate sweetness of French vermouth, each sip transports you to the Mediterranean coast. Ideal for crafting spritzes, Negronis, and boulevardiers, or enjoy its brilliance simply mixed with soda.

How it Tastes:
Zesty, spicy citrus finish with a vibrant, bittersweet flavor. This non-alcoholic alternative to an aperitif blends the sweetness of French vermouth with the sharpness of Italian aperitivo.

Ingredients:
Filtered water, cane sugar, citric acid, xanthan gum, salt, caramel color, potassium sorbate, sodium benzoate, and natural flavors as preservatives.

name: Ritual Zero Proof Tequila
description:
Product Details:
Discover the earthy agave notes and delightful warmth of Non-Alcoholic
Tequila, globally recognized as the top-rated spirit alternative.

Made with premium ingredients and natural botanical flavors, our award-winning
tequila substitute captures the essence of traditional tequila with its grassy
flavor, smoky aroma, and lively heat—all without the alcohol, calories, or
next-day regrets.

How it Tastes:
The essence of classic tequila is encapsulated in Alternative. Your favorite
tequila drinks will benefit from the right balance and heat provided by the
clean burn and hint of rock salt that tempers the green pepper aroma.

Ingredients:
Natural flavors, xanthan gum, cane sugar, citric acid, salt, caramel color,
potassium sorbate, sodium benzoate, and filtered water are used as
preservatives.

name: Roots Divino Aperitif Bianco
description:
Product Details:
Roots Divino Aperitif Bianco revisits ancient herbal traditions, incorporating rosemary, thyme, and wormwood into a modern Greek aperitif. This Mediterranean vermouth infuses sweetened wine with wormwood, rosemary, gentian, and other Greek herbs, using a reverse osmosis process.

How it Tastes:
Roots DIVINO Bianco offers a refreshing and tangy profile, featuring hints of rosemary, thyme, and lemon. Ideal when served over ice with tonic and a lemon slice for a crisp non-alcoholic spritz. Rediscover ancient herbal traditions in this modern Greek "bianco" aperitif.

Ingredients:
Ingredients include water, invert sugar syrup, non-alcoholic fermented grape juice concentrate (6.76%), natural flavoring, citric acid (as an acidifier), and preservatives sodium benzoate and potassium sorbate (0% alcohol by volume).

name: Roots Divino Aperitif Rosso
description:
Product Details:
Roots divino rosso, founded in Greece, honors ancient distillation and herbal remedies. Crafted with fresh botanicals, their vermouths pay homage to tradition.

Rosso, with its bittersweet, orange-forward profile, complements the drier Bianco. Enjoy on ice with tonic or as a vermouth rosso replacement in cocktails.

How it Tastes:
Medium-bodied sweet vermouth with intricate bitter notes of gentian and dried fruits, complemented by rounded orange sweetness and fruitcake spices.

Ingredients:
We rediscover bitter orange, gentian, and wormwood in a bittersweet modern Greek "Aperitif Rosso," taking us back to the origins of ancient herbal treatments. First, they blend and macerate the Greek herbs used in the recipe into sweetened wine to create a Mediterranean Vermouth.

name: RSRV Amari
description: RSRV’s Amari Kenshō Cocktail hints at its earthiness & bitterness through its bouquet. A deep flavor palate expresses its mix of herbs, spices, plants, and dark citrus. All perfectly balanced with a slightly bitter finish that will transport you to the Amalfi coast. Take Amari to the next level with a fresh raspberry garnish. Always serve chilled.

name: RSRV Amari
description: RSRV’s Amari Kenshō Cocktail hints at its earthiness & bitterness through its bouquet. A deep flavor palate expresses its mix of herbs, spices, plants, and dark citrus. All perfectly balanced with a slightly bitter finish that will transport you to the Amalfi coast. Take Amari to the next level with a fresh raspberry garnish. Always serve chilled.

name: RSRV Botanica
description: Welcome to Botanica — a luxurious and sophisticated non-alcoholic Kenshō Cocktail reminiscent of a handcrafted gin and tonic. It's both light and refreshing. You'll notice Botanica's fresh green floral bouquet, with bright, zesty citrus flavor yields to a juniper finish. Equally suited to a hot summer day, or a white tablecloth dinner. Take Botanica to the next level with a lime wedge garnish. Always serve chilled.

name: RSRV Botanica
description: Welcome to Botanica — a luxurious and sophisticated non-alcoholic Kenshō Cocktail reminiscent of a handcrafted gin and tonic. It's both light and refreshing. You'll notice Botanica's fresh green floral bouquet, with bright, zesty citrus flavor yields to a juniper finish. Equally suited to a hot summer day, or a white tablecloth dinner. Take Botanica to the next level with a lime wedge garnish. Always serve chilled.

name: RSRV Orana
description: RSRV’s Orana Kenshō Cocktail has a unique flavor subtly hints at both an old fashioned and a mimosa. You'll taste strong, charred citrus resting on a foundation of wormwood. All perfectly balanced between bitter & sweet, with a hint of smoke. One sip and you’ll think, “Maybe I should buy some cowboy boots and that old pickup truck.” Take Orana to the next level with a maraschino cherry and orange wedge garnish. Always serve chilled.

name: RSRV Orana
description: RSRV’s Orana Kenshō Cocktail has a unique flavor subtly hints at both an old fashioned and a mimosa. You'll taste strong, charred citrus resting on a foundation of wormwood. All perfectly balanced between bitter & sweet, with a hint of smoke. One sip and you’ll think, “Maybe I should buy some cowboy boots and that old pickup truck.” Take Orana to the next level with a maraschino cherry and orange wedge garnish. Always serve chilled.

name: RSRV Variety Pack
description:
Try all four of these luxurious and sophisticated non-alcoholic Kenshō Cocktails:

BOTANICA //
Reminiscent of a handcrafted gin and tonic, it's both light and refreshing. You'll notice Botanica's fresh green floral bouquet, with bright, zesty citrus flavor yields to a juniper finish. Equally suited to a hot summer day, or a white tablecloth dinner. Take Botanica to the next level with a lime wedge garnish. Always serve chilled.

ORANA //
Hinting at both an old fashioned and a mimosa. You'll taste strong, charred citrus resting on a foundation of wormwood. All perfectly balanced between bitter & sweet, with a hint of smoke. One sip and you’ll think, “Maybe I should buy some cowboy boots and that old pickup truck.” Take Orana to the next level with a maraschino cherry and orange wedge garnish. Always serve chilled.

ROSATA //
At first you'll notice bright cherry notes wafting from the glass while small carbonated bubbles shoot a hint of sharp ginger into the bouquet. Take a taste and you'll get rich cherry flavors, both sweet and sour, with just the right amount of ginger nip on the finish. Take Rosata to the next level with a maraschino cherry garnish. Always serve chilled.

AMARI //
Evocative of an Italian aperitif, Amari hints at its earthiness & bitterness through its bouquet. A deep flavor palate expresses its mix of herbs, spices, plants, and dark citrus. All perfectly balanced with a slightly bitter finish that will transport you to the Amalfi coast. Take Amari to the next level with a fresh raspberry garnish. Always serve chilled.

name: Saint Viviana Cabernet Sauvignon
description: Want a juicy or jammy red? Keep shopping. We don't mind. Tannin fiends who thought you'd never find a non-alcoholic Cab that stands up to a ribeye: this is your Holy Grail. Retains the leather and tobacco notes you want, with a modern, medium-body infinitely more drinkable than 90s cough syrup Cabs. And it's super low in sugar and calories, too.

name: Saint Viviana Sauvignon Blanc
description: Dry and lively non-alcoholic Sauvignon Blanc from Washington State. Green herbs on the nose, ripe orange, grapefruit, and melon on the palate. Bracing acidity for a mouthwatering finish that brings you back for another sip... or gulp. Saint Viviana starts with super premium wine, which means fewer additives. Fewer additives means better flavor with less sugar and lower calories. Maybe you really can have it all.

name: Sardine Cocktail Napkins Box Set
description: Here fishy, fishy! We’ve fallen hook, line, and sinker for our set of sardine cocktail napkins. These swimmers — made from 100% linen — are truly the catch of the day. Comes in picture-perfect packaging designed to resemble a sardine tin.

name: Seedlip Cocktails Book
description:
Seedlip is the world's first distilled non-alcoholic spirit, solving the ever-growing dilemma of 'what to drink when you're not drinking ®'. It is based on the distilled non-alcoholic remedies from The Art of Distillation written in 1651, and now repurposed to pioneer a new category of drinks.

Seedlip is a grown-up non-alchoholic alternative to spirited drinks that balances crisp, delicious flavors and healthy, natural ingredients.

This recipe book offers an exclusive collection of Seedlip’s finesse cocktails as well as insight into their ethos, technique, and ingredients.

Highly illustrated, with recipes from the world’s best bartenders and newly commissioned images from leading drinks photographer, Rob Lawson, here are the secrets of the Seedlip way.

name: Seedlip Garden 108
description:
Product Details:
Searching for a revitalizing, herbaceous, alcohol-free beverage? Introducing Seedlip Garden. This floral infusion of Peas & Hay, combined with classic garden herb distillates, pays homage to the English countryside.

To craft a delightful non-alcoholic drink, simply pour 50ml of Seedlip Garden 108 over ice, add tonic water, and garnish with either a Sugar Snap Pea or a sprig of Mint.

How it Tastes:
Seedlip Garden 108 offers a vibrant, herbaceous combination of Peas, Hay, and Hops. Its intricate foundation encompasses traditional garden herbs like Rosemary, Thyme, and Spearmint, contributing to its nuanced and somewhat savory profile.

Ingredients:
Water, Natural Extracts & Distillates from Botanical Sources (Peas, Hay, Rosemary, Thyme, & Hops). Sorbitol potassium is a preservative. Acid: acidic citric.

name: Seedlip Grove 42
description:
Product Details:
This Seedlip variation is bursting with citrus-forward botanicals, particularly oranges. As the first distilled non-alcoholic spirit globally, Seedlip revolutionized the beverage landscape by addressing the question of what to drink when abstaining from alcohol.

While often compared to gin, Seedlip offers a unique experience, devoid of juniper, yet seamlessly replaces gin in cocktails. Expect complexity and distinction in every Seedlip creation.

How it Tastes:
Light in body and dry, this beverage is abundant with flavors of bitter orange, mandarin, and blood orange, complemented by invigorating spices and fresh hints of ginger and lemongrass.

Ingredients:
Water, 15% Natural Botanical Extracts and Distillates, Acid: Citric Acid, Preservative: Potassium Sorbate

name: Seedlip Spice 94
description:
Product Details:
Seedlip Spice 94 is a non-alcoholic spirit with an aromatic flavor profile. It boasts warm spice notes from Allspice berries, citrusy hints from Lemon and Grapefruit peels, and a lingering bitter finish from high-quality barks.

Made with a blend of Allspice berries, Cardamom, Grapefruit Peel, Lemon Peel, Oak, and Cascarilla bark, it's best enjoyed with tonic over ice and garnished with Pink Grapefruit peel. It also serves as an excellent base for non-alcoholic cocktails.

How it Tastes:
It offers a spicy warmth from Allspice berries sourced from Jamaica, complemented by citrusy accents from Lemon and Grapefruit peels, and finishes with a lingering bitterness from premium barks.

Ingredients:
Cardamom, grapefruit peel, lemon peel, oak and cascarilla bark, and allspice berries.

name: SemiPlume Sparkling Brut
description:
At first nose, SemiPlume exudes notes of very fruity notes of fig and yellow fruits. After aeration, you can smell beautiful notes of chamomile, toast and butter.

The mouth has a very nice round and creamy volume. You will be able to taste the aromatic complexity of butter, delicate fruit, dried flowers and savory. There is a good length with notes of aromatic pepper and citrus.

It is a dry non alcoholic sparkling brut that is perfect to celebrate any occasion.

Serve extra chilled in a champagne glass.

Consume within 2 days after opening.

name: Senorita Lime Jalapeno
description:
Fresh, fun, and full of flavor—this is the evolution of the margarita. Señorita’s THC Margarita is made with real lime juice, organic Mexican blue agave, jalapeño, and Himalayan pink salt, Señorita delivers a bold, balanced taste with just the right amount of heat. Enjoy our THC mocktails with no hangover. Just fast-acting THC and feel-good vibes. 

Crafted with natural ingredients and designed for the modern buzz, this zero-proof margarita was named Best THC Beverage by High Times.

name: Senorita Ranch Water
description:
Clean, zesty lime meets a minerally fizz that drinks like a high-desert breeze after sundown. Señorita THCRanch Water is dry, bright, and endlessly crushable. Enjoy our non-alcoholic ranch water with no hangover. Just a clean, uplifting THC buzz with a fast onset and only 40 calories per can.

name: Sentia Gaba Gold
description: Powered by hops, and schisandra for calm, lifted mood, and mental balance, GABA Gold is perfect for sharing, bringing warmth and wellness to any celebration or social moment.

name: Silent Flower Rosé
description:
Product Details:

Silent Flower Rosé is a sophisticated, hemp-derived THC sparkling beverage crafted for those who love the elegance of a chilled rosé — without the alcohol. Light, floral, and beautifully balanced, Silent Flower delivers a gentle, mood-lifting experience powered by hemp-derived Delta-9 THC and CBD. No artificial flavors, no preservatives, no hangover. Just pure, plant-powered bliss in every sip. 5mg THC | 5mg CBD per can.

 

How it Tastes:

Delicate and dry with a blush of wild strawberry, white peach, and rose petal. Crisp bubbles carry soft floral notes through to a clean, lingering finish — everything you love about a summer rosé, reimagined without the alcohol.

 

Ingredients: 

Sparkling water, organic cane sugar, natural strawberry flavor, natural peach flavor, natural rose flavor, hemp-derived Delta-9 THC, hemp-derived CBD, citric acid, potassium sorbate.

 

Certificate of Analysis

name: Soul Hum Unwind
description:
Let go of the day and embrace a sense of calm with Soul Hum’s Unwind, a soothing elixir crafted to help you relax, restore, and reconnect. Our Relaxed/Hazy Terpene Blend is thoughtfully designed to ease tension, uplift your mood, and invite a sense of social connection—perfect for winding down solo or with loved ones. 

Discover the ancient herbs trusted for centuries to bring balance, relaxation, and mental clarity. Bacopa Monnieri Extract is revered for its cognitive-enhancing properties, boosting memory, focus, and reducing anxiety. Valerian Root Extract is your go-to for deep relaxation, helping to soothe the nervous system and promote restful sleep, making it ideal for easing tension and stress. Ashwagandha Extract supports overall wellness by reducing cortisol levels, combating fatigue, and restoring vitality to both mind and body. Together, this powerful trio helps you unwind, de-stress, and sharpen your focus—bringing balance to your modern, busy life.

Ingredients: Filtered Water, Organic Cane Sugar, Acacia Gum, Natural Flavors**, Brewed Black Tea Extract, Citric Acid, Himalayan Pink Salt, Ascorbic acid, Ashwagandha Extract (KSM-66), Lemon Balm Extract, Chinotto Extract, Natural Sage Extract, Bacopa Monnieri Extract, Valerian Root Extract, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate (to preserve freshness, less than 0.1%) **Sustainably produced flavor blends Blood Orange, Bitter Orange Apéritif, and Relaxed (Hazy) terpenes

description:
Channel nature’s energy to harmonize mind, body, and spirit with this vibrant, citrusy elixir that ends with a zesty kick. Infused with intentional ingredients, it guides you on a transformative journey. Sip mindfully and awaken your highest self. 

Soul Hum’s Uplift Elixir is crafted with a blend of powerhouse ingredients to fuel both your body and mind. Panax Ginseng boosts stamina and mental clarity, providing sustained energy without jitters. L-Theanine, derived from green tea, helps enhance focus and calm, promoting a state of alert relaxation. Guarana, known for its natural caffeine content, gives you an energy boost while supporting mental performance and physical endurance. Together, this trio works to keep you energized, sharp, and balanced throughout the day.

Ingredients: Filtered Water, Organic Blue Agave Syrup, Organic Kombucha Culture, Organic Cane Sugar, Natural Flavors**, Green Tea Extract (L-Theanine), Citric Acid, Guarana Seed Extract, Ascorbic acid, Himalayan Pink Salt, Ashwagandha Extract (KSM-66), Panax Ginseng Root Extract, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate (to preserve freshness, less than 0.1%), Vitamin B12. Sustainable flavor blends of Buddha’s Hand, Pineapple, Pineapple Express terpenes and Shisho.

name: Sovi Reserve Red
description:
The Taste
Elegant & savory. Black plum, dried herbs & baking spices.

The blend changes from year to year, but the style remains consistent: elegant and savory with complexity gained from the long oak-influenced aging process. A blend of 2018 Tempranillo and 2023 Malbec, both aged in a combination of French and American oak.

name: Sovi Sparkling Orange Wine
description:
The Taste
Lively & layered. Melon, kumquat & orange blossom.

Crafted from Pinot Gris grapes, this wine derives its soft orange hue from extended skin contact during fermentation, a process that imparts tannins, texture, and complexity to the wine. Known as Ramato style, this method, traditionally used in the Friuli-Venezia Giulia region, creates a unique copper-colored wine that is both distinctive and whimsical.

name: Spiritless Espresso Martini
description:
Product Details:
The Spiritless Espresso Martini is a convenient pour-and-enjoy cocktail for those who love the bold, smooth taste of an espresso martini without the alcohol. No need for any extra equipment—just pour and savor. Opt for the full Spiritless experience, or mix it with your favorite vodka to enjoy the same espresso martini flavor with a lower ABV and fewer calories.

Made with real brewed coffee
Contains less than 0.5% ABV
38mg of caffeine per serving
35 calories per serving
8g of sugar per serving

How it Tastes:
Savor the rich taste of coffee, perfectly balanced with a slight sweetness and a subtle bitterness. Just add a coffee bean garnish for the finishing touch.

Ingredients:
Brewed Coffee, Cane Sugar, Natural Flavor, Glycerin, Phosphoric Acid, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Sodium Benzoate (Preservative), Xanthan Gum

name: Spiritless Kentucky 74
description:
Product Details:
Monday Zero Alcohol Whiskey draws its inspiration from iconic American favorites, meticulously produced in limited quantities by a renowned Bourbon artisan.

Its flavor profile evokes notes of butterscotch, raisin, and toasted brown sugar, while the palate delivers a blend of roasted coffee, decadent caramel, and velvety molasses. The finish is enduring, characterized by a central warmth of spicy notes with a subtle hint of orange zest.

**Vegan, Gluten free, keto**

How it Tastes:
Like a Tennessee whiskey, it has a deep, rich color. The aroma is strong, with notes of oak, vanilla, cocoa, and baking spices. Rich and silky with a hint of burn from the baking spices, the taste is dominated by coffee and cocoa.

When savored over ice, it becomes more mellow and rounder in flavor.

Ingredients:
Natural spring water, fruit and vegetable juice (for color), citric acid, natural flavors, sodium benzoate (preservative), and monk fruit extract

name: Spiritless Margarita
description:
Product Details:
Introducing Spiritless Margarita, a perfect pour-over version of the classic cocktail. Crafted with Jalisco 55, our award-winning non-alcoholic tequila, along with a dash of all-natural cane sugar, fresh lime juice, and a touch of salt, this distilled, zero-proof concoction offers a masterful take on the world's most popular cocktail. Designed for even the most discerning palates, simply pop the top, pour over ice, and savor the moment.

Gluten-free, vegan friendly, non-GMO, and keto approved

How it Tastes:
Spiritless Margarita delights with its balanced blend of non-alcoholic tequila, fresh lime juice, and a hint of sweetness from cane sugar, all perfectly complemented by a touch of salt for a refreshing and satisfying drinking experience.

Ingredients:
Jalisco 55, cane sugar, lime, salt

name: Spores: Magical Mushroom Book
description:
To see a mushroom is a kind of magic. It is embodied evidence of total serendipity, a beguiling conjunction of time and place, weather and circumstance. It is also evidence of the unseen, thriving life that surrounds us. In this 208-page photographic foray, more than 90 artists capture mushrooms in settings both natural and supernatural—growing on the forest floor, popping up in our homes, gleaming in a fluorescent glow, and arranged like alien flowers. Each image invites readers to look closely, revealing new dimensions of the mushroom’s magic.

Glossy hardcover with embossed title. 208 pages, including surprise die cuts. 9.75 x 8.25”. Cover photo by Matthieu Visentin.

Gentle carbonation is added to mimic the bite and mouthfeel that alcohol typically provides.

How it Tastes:
St. Agrestis Phony Mezcal Negroni delights with its distinctive blend of smoke, vegetal complexity, and earthiness, perfectly balanced with bitter undertones for a truly memorable drinking experience.

name: The Booze Free Bar (C)art Book
description:
Practical tips, tricks, and 45 delicious, easy-to-follow recipes for alcohol-free cocktails that suit every palate. 

Cutting down on alcohol need not mean cutting down on flavor and fun. Here to prove it, Cece Bailey Page, author of the bestselling Bar(c)art Book, is back with a book of zero-proof recipes that even a total beginner can try.Starting with an introduction to the tools and glassware you'll need, you'll then delve into four chapters broken up by flavor profile, not spirit - from Sweet & Smooth and Bubbly & Bright to Tart & Tangy and Savory Surprises.

Plus, there's a bonus section on Party Picks, so you can share the mocktail love at a larger scale, too.With her characteristically warm, welcoming style, Cece provides:

- A detailed guide to bar tools and glassware

- 45 fun and easy-to-follow mocktail recipes, including the Wascally Wabbit, the Lavender Haze, the Dolly Parton, and the Red Cherry Disco Ball

- Stylish, colorful hand-drawn illustrations to accompany each section and recipe

- Tips on suggested substitutions throughout.

Whether you're an expectant mom, a sober-curious human, or a mixologist wanting to expand your repertoire, this is your go-to recipe book for drinks that inspire and delight.

name: The Happiest Hour Book
description:
Motherhood + Mocktails = A new era of fun and fabulous sober drinking.

Calling all mothers That includes mom's of humans, pets, and bonus points if you're over 50. Mocktail Mom is here to champion drinking while being a mother without the alcohol. Whoever said you can no longer be a part of the party is no longer invited. No more being booted to the kid's table With this beautifully illustrated recipe book with over 50 mocktails, grab your shakers and let's start muddling-like-a-mother.

Written by author Debbie Podlogar, founder of Mocktail Mom - a platform fueled by a sober drinking club with over thousands of community members seeking a fun, alcohol-free life - Mocktail Mom will inspire your inner bartender to satisfy that fix busy and sleepless mothers all need. Whoever said mocktails can't have fun has yet to visit the chapters of this book, which include: Not Past Our Prime, Spicy Momma Mocktails, Hot Flash Mommas Need Frozen Drinks, Mules-for-Days, Holidays without Hangovers, and More With recipes such as:

  • When Life Gives You Don Lemon
  • Don't Be So Old Fashioned
  • Summertime Refresh
  • Sober Woman's Sangria
  • Momma's Not Buzzed
  • I Don't Have Time
  • and so much more


With over 50 alcohol-free cocktail recipes, discover tips and inspiration for creating the best times while being a sober mother. Learn how to set up your home-bar and make your mocktails fancy and fabulous with a garnish glossary. With even more hacks to surviving motherhood with a beautiful drink in hand, nothing is impossible when it comes to turning classic drinks alcohol-free.

Display this gorgeously illustrated book on your home bar or in your kitchen and show your sober-curious mom friends and family just how much fun can be had with mocktails.

description:

How it Tastes: Known for its distinctive bite and vibrant crimson hue, morello cherry entwines with Social's rich herbal darkness and notes of sweet molasses. Expect layers of tart fruit, smoky tobacco, leather, and the warmth of a crackling log fire - a bold, seductive flavor profile that demands attention.

Ingredients: Filtered water, agave nectar, morello cherry, damiana leaf, lapsang souchong tea, yerba mate, passion flower, tulsi, cacao bean, green tea, caraway seed, black carrot concentrate, coconut vinegar, molasses, potassium sorbate (preservative), ascorbic acid (antioxidant), and vitamins B3, B6, B7, and B12.

name: Three Spirit Livener
description:
Product Details:
Three Spirit's Livener is a dynamic elixir designed to invigorate and uplift. Made from a curated selection of botanicals, it offers a complex and energizing flavor profile.

With its blend of stimulating ingredients, it helps awaken the senses and boost vitality, making it an ideal choice for starting your day or enhancing your energy levels during social gatherings.

How it Tastes:
Tangy and crisp, including ginger, guava, and watermelon. A long dry finish of rich tannins, hibiscus, and an unusual heat is created by the combination of bitter flavors of ginseng and floral green plants.

Ingredients:
Filtered water, watermelon concentrate, pomegranate molasses, concentrated aqueous extract of dried Ilex guayusa leaves, red tea (including natural caffeine and L-Theanine), concentrated aqueous extract of hibiscus, guava leaf, schisandra berry, Siberian and Panax ginseng, natural flavors, apple cider vinegar, concentrated black carrot concentrate, tartaric acid, pectin, and potassium sorbate as preservatives.

name: Three Spirit Livener EXTRA SPICY
description:
Product Details: Three Spirit's Livener XS is a limited edition extra spicy elixir for those who crave heat and energy. This fiery concoction amplifies the original Livener's invigorating blend with an intensified cayenne kick that energizes the body and ignites the palate. Fired up from cayenne pepper, palate-stimulating schisandra berries, ginseng, and apple cider vinegar, then energized with guayusa, guava leaf, and green tea, this is the ultimate botanical boost for those who like it hot. Get it while it's available - when it's gone, it's gone.

How it Tastes: Fresh and fiery with a bold cayenne punch, complemented by bright watermelon, tropical guava, and warming ginger. Bitter notes of ginseng and floral green herbs balance the heat, creating a lingering dry finish of rich tannins, hibiscus, and exotic spice that leaves you wanting more.

Ingredients: Filtered water, agave nectar, cayenne pepper, schisandra berries, ginseng, apple cider vinegar, guayusa, guava leaf, green tea, watermelon, ginger, hibiscus, black carrot concentrate, coconut vinegar, potassium sorbate (preservative), ascorbic acid (antioxidant), and vitamins B3, B6, B7, and B12.

name: Three Spirit Nightcap
description:
Product Details:
Three Spirit Nightcap is the ideal night-time indulgence, crafted with tree saps, aromatic plants, and herbs for a complex blend of wood, spices, and citrusy notes. It concludes with a smooth combination of maple, vanilla, and hazelnut.

This calming concoction features lemon balm, valerian, and hops to relax the mind, while ashwagandha and white willow bark combat stress and fatigue.

Vegan, gluten free

How it Tastes:
Three Spirit Nightcap offers a complex blend of wood, spices, and citrusy notes, finishing with smooth maple, vanilla, and hazelnut flavors. It combines calming lemon balm, valerian, and hops with stress-relieving ashwagandha and white willow bark.

Ingredients:
Filtered water, maple syrup from Canada, Melon Hüll hops, botanical extracts (such as lemon balm, ashwagandha, turmeric, and valerian roots, white willow bark, ginger, and vanilla orchid), food acid (lactic acid), tannin infusion, potassium sorbate to keep freshness, and vitamin C (ascorbic acid).

name: Three Spirit Social
description:
Product Details:
Three Spirit's Social Elixir is a sophisticated concoction designed to elevate social experiences. Crafted from a unique blend of botanicals, it offers a nuanced flavor profile that stimulates conversation and connection.

With its complex mix of ingredients, it enhances the social atmosphere, encouraging lively interactions and memorable moments.

How it Tastes:
Strong flavors emanate from strong plants! Rich, deep flavors of cocoa and black apples are accompanied by bright, dry spices on the nose.

Ingredients:
Filtered Water, Agave Nectar, Yerba Mate, Passion Flower, Tulsi, Cacao Bean, Green Tea, Damiana Leaf, Caraway Seed, Black Carrot Concentrate, Coconut Vinegar, Molasses, Potassium Sorbate, antioxidant, Ascorbic Acid, and vitamins B3, B6, B7, and B12.

Candied Sour Black Cherries in Syrup | Heritage

Amarena cherries are the fruit of the Prunus cerasus tree which originated in Asia Minor and were brought to Italy by the Roman General Lucullus. The sour cherry is a variety of cherry with a tart, refreshing flavor. A summer fruit which is picked in July, high in vitamins A, B1, and C.

Sparkling water, natural blood orange flavor, natural lime flavor, hemp-derived Delta-9 THC, hemp-derived CBD, citric acid.

description: Trejo's Spirits Zero Proof American Whiskey Alternative is a non-alcoholic spirit designed to mimic the taste and feel of traditional American whiskey. This drink provides a gentle, calming experience through its natural adaptogens, offering a perfect way to de-stress and unwind without a hangover. The combination of its light, floral flavour and fun.

description: Spice up the season with a flavorful cup of hot mulled wine, from the comfort of your own home. Our blend is full-bodied, easily brewed, and perfect for ringing in the holidays. Happy sipping!

description:

name: Urb Red Eye Black Cherry Indica
description:
No eye drops needed—this is the red-eye you’ll want to catch. Red Eye Skybites fuse bold flavor with high-potency hemp-derived cannabinoids for a euphoric lift that hits at cruising altitude. These potent sky-high gummies blend bold flavor and premium cannabinoids for an energizing journey. Infused with Delta 8, Delta 9, THCP, and True-Infused Terpenes- they’re built for whatever’s next, whether you're rising above or cruising through.

Each gummy delivers 239mg of Delta 8, 10mg of Delta 9, and 1mg of THCP for sky-level elevation. Due to the potency of these, we recommend that experienced users start with ¼ of the gummy!

How it Tastes:
Passionfruit Mango is a bright and tropical blend; energized by α-pinene, β-pinene, and limonene. Crafted for Euphoria, with a sativa uplift

Dragonfruit Paradise is sweet, exotic, and dreamy with linalool, α-pinene, and citronellol. Crafted for Relax, with a calming indica profile.

Black Cherry highlights dark fruit richness with linalool and myrcene. Crafted for Rest, with a deeply soothing indica blend.

name: Wander + Found Chardonnay
description:
Product Details:

This wonderful Non-Alcoholic Chardonnay is the latest addition to Wander & Found’s award-winning line. It has an original character that is clean with notes of bright citrus fruits. It has a well- balanced acidity and a hint of gooseberry before a long, satisfying finish.

Different from California Chardonnays, the German Rhine region-grown Chardonnay grapes offer more minerality and hint of tartness before giving way to the earthy deep Chardonnay flavor.  

How it Tastes:
This is an easily enjoyed wine on its own, or it pairs well with hearty dinners like roast chicken, or seared salmon. 

Ingredients:
Reduced alcohol content wine, concentrated grape must that has been rectified, carbon dioxide, ascorbic acid, and sulphites.

name: Wander + Found Cuvée Blanc
description:
Product Details:
Wander & Found introduces yet another exceptional wine with their Cuvée Blanc from Germany. This distinctive wine offers a crisp and invigorating profile, featuring hints of lime and citrus intertwined with the lively tartness of green apple.

Balanced acidity enhances its body, striking a delicate yet bold character with a relatively dry and lingering finish. This refreshing and sophisticated wine is suitable for any occasion, whether enjoyed on its own or paired with light meals. Truly remarkable.

How it Tastes:
Crisp and Refreshing: Refreshing notes of tart gooseberry, sweet starfruit, and zesty citrus zest. Its body is enhanced by the perfect amount of acidity, which is both bold and delicate, with a rather dry finish.

Ingredients:
Reduce the alcohol content of wine, grape must, rectified concentrated grape must, and sulfite.

name: Wander + Found Pinot Noir
description:
Product Details:
Wander & Found continues to excel with this refined red blend crafted in the style of a Spätburgunder, known more commonly as Non-Alcoholic Pinot Noir.

This well-balanced red wine offers notes of ripe dark red fruits complemented by the earthy richness of dried currants. With its familiar and desirable tannin structure and a complex, lingering finish, it pairs seamlessly with hearty steak or grilled fish and vegetables.

Wander & Found Pinot Noir is an ideal non-alcoholic option for dinner or to enjoy a glass on its own.

How it Tastes:
This Pinot Noir offers a crisp and invigorating experience, showcasing flavors of red cherries and dark berries alongside a gentle tannin structure. It serves as an excellent companion to grilled fish and subtly seasoned meats.

Fans of cool-climate red wines will appreciate its remarkable resemblance to traditional Pinot Noir.

Ingredients:
Grape must, dehydrated wine, sucrose, carbon dioxide, and sulfur.

description:
Product Details:
Wander & Found has created yet another standout with this charming wandering Rosé.

This refreshingly distinctive wine presents a unique complexity, featuring citrus and ripe berry notes harmonized with a mineral foundation, imparting depth and structure and leading to a surprisingly enduring finish.

Share a glass with friends during a light lunch or savor it on its own for a delightful experience.

How it Tastes:
Savor this sophisticated and invigorating Rose with notes of citrus and red berries, tempered with a mineral foundation that gives it structure and depth.

Ingredients:
Dealcoholized wine, grape must, rectified concentrated grape must and Sulphites.

Yuzu Juice.

name: Zero Origami Sake
description: ZERO is non-alcoholic sake made with traditional methods. It’s all of the same ingredients minus the alcohol-producing yeast, making it an ideal option for those seeking a naturally sweet, non-alcoholic alternative to traditional sake. ZERO boasts a delightful sweetness complemented with deep umami.

name: Zeronimo Gruner Veltliner
description:
Crafted from 100% native Grüner Veltliner grapes in Austria and aged in stainless steel, this dry white wine offers a true expression of elegance and authenticity. Rich aromas of elderflower and honeysuckle are balanced with crisp minerality and notes of exotic fruits and herbal undertones. This full-bodied white wine will immerse you in the heart of Austria’s culinary culture.

Format: 750 ml bottle

ABV: <0.5%

name: Zeronimo Zweigelt Red Wine
description:
This dry red wine from Austria’s renowned Burgenland region is crafted from 100% native Zweigelt and aged for 15 months in small oak barrels. It offers a noble profile with aromas of juicy blackberry, cherry, vanilla, and nougat, perfectly balanced by exotic wood spices, rosemary, and black tea. Lively and elegant, with a full body that will captivate red wine enthusiasts.

Format: 750 ml bottle

ABV: <0.5%
